verses.hebrew: [כָּל חָכְמָה מֵיהֹוָה, וִעמּוֹ הִיא לְעוֹלָמִים.]
verses.english: All wisdom is from the Lord, and is with him forever.

verses.hebrew: [חוֹל יַמִּים וְנִטְפֵי מָטָר, וִימוֹת עוֹלָם מִי יִמְנֶה.]
verses.english: The sands of the seas, the drops of rain, and the days of eternity, who can count them?

verses.hebrew: [רוּם שָׁמַיִם וְרֹחַב אָרֶץ, וְעֹמֶק תְּהוֹם מִי יַחֲקֹר.]
verses.english: The height of the sky, the breadth of the earth, and the depth of the abyss, who can estimate?

verses.hebrew: [מִכָּל אֵלֶּה רַבָּה הַחָכְמָה, וְגָבְרָה הָאֱמֶת מֵעוֹלָם.]
verses.english: But exceeding the scope of these is wisdom, and truth is broader still.

verses.hebrew: [שֹׁרֶשׁ הַחָכְמָה לְמִי נִגְלָה, וּמַעֲרֻמֶּיהָ מִי יָדַע.]
verses.english: To whom shall the root of wisdom be revealed (uncovered), and who knows her wiles (nakednesses).

verses.hebrew: [אֶחָד הוּא נוֹרָא בִּלְבַדּוֹ, אֱלֹהִים מוֹשֵׁל עַל כָּל אוֹצָרֶיהָ.]
verses.english: He is uniquely awesome, God is executor of all of her treasuries.

verses.hebrew: [הוּא בְחָנָהּ וְרָאָהּ וְסְפָרָהּ, וּנְתָנָהּ לְאֹהֲבָיו.]
verses.english: He scrutinized her and examined her and counted her, and he gave her to his lovers.

verses.hebrew: [אֶל כָּל בָּשָׂר כִּרְצוֹנוֹ נְתָנָהּ, וַיִּתְּנָהּ לְאֹהֲבָיו.]
verses.english: Unto all flesh he gave her according to his desire, and he will give her to his lovers.

verses.hebrew: [יִרְאַת יְהֹוָה כָּבוֹד וִיקָר, וּגְדֻלָּה וְעֲטֶרֶת תִּפְאָרֶת.]
verses.english: The fear of the Lord is glory and honor, and greatness and a crown of splendor.

verses.hebrew: [יִרְאַת יְהֹוָה מְשַׂמַּחַת לֵב, וְנוֹתֶנֶת שִׂמְחָה וְחֵן וְאֹרֶךְ יָמִים.]
verses.english: The fear of the Lord gladdens the heart, and grants joy, and grace, and length of days.

verses.hebrew: [יְרֵא יְהֹוָה תִּיטַב אַחֲרִיתוֹ, וּבְאַחֲרִית יָמָיו יִתְבָּרָךְ.]
verses.english: Fear the Lord and do good by Him, and at the end of your days he will bless you.

verses.hebrew: [רֵאשִׁית חָכְמָה יִרְאַת יְהֹוָה, וְעִם נֶאֱמָנִים נוֹצְרָה בַבָּטֶן.]
verses.english: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom, and for the faithful it gestates in the belly.

verses.hebrew: [עִם אַנְשֵׁי אֱמֶת מֵעוֹלָם הוּכָנָה, וְעִם זַרְעָם נֶאֱמָן חַסְדּוֹ.]
verses.english: From eternity it has been prepared for those who have integrity, and His grace is faithful to their offspring.

verses.hebrew: [רֵאשִׁית חָכְמָה יִרְאַת יְהֹוָה, וּמַרְבָּה שָׁלוֹם וְחַיִּים וּמַרְפֵּא.]
verses.english: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom, and it increases peace, life, and wellbeing.

verses.hebrew: [כָּל אוֹצָרֶיהָ תְּמַלֵּא חֶמְדָּה, וַאֲסָמֶיהָ בִּתְבוּאָתָהּ.]
verses.english: All her treasuries will be filled to satisfaction, and her granaries with her satiation.

verses.hebrew: [רֵאשִׁית חָכְמָה יִרְאַת יְהֹוָה, וּתְרַוֵּה בְּרֹב תְּבוּאָתָהּ.]
verses.english: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom, she will intoxicate with her ample satiation.

verses.hebrew: [מַטּהֵ עֹז הִיא וּמַשְׁעֵנָה, תְּהִלָּה וּכְבוֹד עוֹלָם לְכָל הַהוֹלֵךְ אַחֲרֶיהָ.]
verses.english: She is a strong and reliable rod, praise and eternal glory unto those that follow her.

verses.hebrew: [שָׁרְשֶׁיהָ לְעוֹלָם, וַעֲנָפֶיהָ אֹרֶך יָמִים.]
verses.english: Her roots are eternal, and her branches are ever-reaching.

verses.hebrew: [אַשְׁרֵי אֱנוֹשׁ יֶהְגֶּה בָּהּ, וְטוֹבָה הִיא לוֹ מִכָּל אוֹצָר.]
verses.english: Happy is the person who meditates on her, and she benefits them more than any other treasury.

verses.hebrew: [אַשְׁרֵי אֱנוֹשׁ יִקְרַב אֵלֶיהָ, וּפְקוּדֶיהָ יִשְׁתַּעֲשַׁע.]
verses.english: Happy is the person who draws close to her, and those in her presence enjoy themselves.

verses.hebrew: [עֲטֶרֶת עוֹלָם תָּשִׁית עָלָיו, וּזְכוּת עוֹלָמִים בֵּין קְדוֹשִׁים.]
verses.english: She will crown them with an eternal diadem, and eternal merit among holy ones.

verses.hebrew: [יִשְׂמַח בָּהּ וְתִשְׂמַח בּוֹ, וּבַל תַּעַזְבֵהוּ לְעוֹלָם וָעֶד.]
verses.english: They will rejoice in her and she in them, and she will never ever abandon them.

verses.hebrew: [מַלְאֲכֵי אֱלֹהִים יִשְׂמְחוּ בָּהּ, וִיסַפְּרוּ כָּל תְּהִלַּת יְהֹוָה.]
verses.english: Angels of God will rejoice in her, and recount all the praises of the Lord.

verses.hebrew: [הַסֵּפֶר הַזֶּה כֻּלּוֹ מָלֵא מִמֶּנָּה, אַשְׁרֵי אֱנוֹשׁ יִשְׁמַע וְיַעֲשֶׂה.]
verses.english: And this recounting is entirely replete with her, happy is the one who attends and acts.

verses.hebrew:
[שְמָעוּנִי יִרְאֵי אֱלֹהִים, וְהַאֲזִינוּ וְהִתְבּוֹנְנוּ לִדְבָרַי.]
[מִי הֶחָפֵץ לָרֶשֶׁת אוֹתָהּ, נַחֲלַת עוֹלָם וְשִׂמְחָה רַבָּה.]
verses.english: Hearken unto me fearers of God, listen and understand my words. The one who is steadfast in receiving her, has an eternal inheritance and great joy.

verses.hebrew: [כָּל דְבָרַי שְׁמַע וַעֲשֵׂה, וְתִכָּתֵב בְּסֵפֶר הַחַיִּים.]
verses.english: Attend to and act upon all my words, that you may be written in the book of life.

verses.hebrew: [אֱהַב יִרְאַת יְהֹוָה, וְאַשֵּׁר בָּהּ לִבְּךָ וְאַל תִּירָא.]
verses.english: Love the fear of the Lord, that your heart may be happy and do not fear.

verses.hebrew:
[קְרַב וְאַל תְּאַחֵר, וְתִמְצָא חַיִּים לְנַפְשְׁךָ.]
[וְכַאֲשֶר תִּהְיֶה קָרוּב, כְּגִבּוֹר וּכְאִישׁ חַיִל.]
verses.english: Draw near and do not distance yourself, that your soul may live. And in your drawing near, be like a hero and a warrior.

verses.hebrew: [בְּנִי אַל תְּכַזֵּב בְּיִרְאַת יְהֹוָה, וְאַל תִּקְרַב אֵלָיו בְּלֵב וָלֵב.]
verses.english: My child, do not fail in fearing the Lord, and do not approach God with attention divided (lit. a heart and a heart).

verses.hebrew: [אַל תִּתְכַּבֵּד בָּהּ לְעֵין אָדָם, וּבִשְׂפָתֶיךָ הִזָּהֵר מְאֹד.]
verses.english: Give no weight to human regard, and be most careful with your speech.

verses.hebrew: [אַל תְּשַׁנֶּה מַאֲמרוֹ וְאַל תִּירָא, וְאַל תָּבִיא קְלָלָה עַל נַפְשְׁךָ.]
verses.english: Do not alter God's word and have no fear, lest you bring a curse on your soul.

verses.hebrew: [פֶּן יְגַלֶּה יְהֹוָה מִסְתָרֶיךָ, וּבְתוֹךְ קָהָל יַפִּילֶךָ.]
verses.english: For the Lord reveal your secrets, and bring your downfall in the midst of the community.

verses.hebrew: [כִּי הִתְגָאֵיתָ בְּיִרְאַת אֱלֹהִים, וְתוֹךְ לִבְּךָ מָלֵא נִקְלָה.]
verses.english: For you exalted yourself with feigned piety, but within your heart is full of shame.

1.heVersionTitle: Ben Sira, David Kahana ed. -- Wikisource

verses.hebrew: [בְּנִי אִם תִּקְרַב לַעֲבוֹד אֶת יְהֹוָה, הָכֵן נַפְשְׁךָ לְכָל נִסָּיוֹן.]
verses.english: My child, if you will draw near to the work of the Lord, prepare your soul for all manner of trials.

verses.hebrew: [הָכֵן לִבְּךָ וְהִתְחַזֵּק, וְאַל תִּבָּהֵל בְּיוֹם אֵד.]
verses.english: Prepare your heart and be strengthened, and do not panic on the day of destruction.

verses.hebrew: [הִדָּבֵק בּוֹ וְאַל תָּסוּר, לְמַעַן תִּגְדַּל בְּאַחֲרִיתֶךָ.]
verses.english: Cleave unto God and do not turn away, that you may have a great future.

verses.hebrew: [כָּל הַבָּא עָלֶיךָ קַבֵּל, וּבְשִׁבְרְךָ הַאֲרֵךְ רוּחַ.]
verses.english: Receive all who come to you, and be of open spirit with your provisions.

verses.hebrew: [כִּי בָאֵשׁ יִבָּחֵן זָהָב, וּבְנֵי אָדָם בְּכוּר עֹנִי.]
verses.english: For gold is tested in fire, and humanity is matured by poverty.

verses.hebrew: [הַאֲמֵן בּוֹ וְהוּא יַחֲזִיק בְּךָ, יַשֵּׁר אָרְחוֹתֶיךָ וְקַוֵּה אֵלָיו.]
verses.english: Have faith in God and God will strengthen you, firm your path and have hope in God.

verses.hebrew: [יִרְאֵי יְהֹוָה חַכּוּ לְחַסְדּוֹ, וְאַל תִּטּוּ פֶּן תִּפֹלוּ.]
verses.english: Let those who fear the Lord anticipate God's grace, and not incline lest you fall.

verses.hebrew: [יִרְאֵי יְהֹוָה הַאֲמִינוּ בּוֹ, וְהוּא לֹא יָלִין שְׂכַרְכֶם.]
verses.english: Let those who fear the Lord trust in God, and God will not tarry in your reward.

verses.hebrew: [יִרְאֵי יְהֹוָה קַוּוּ לְטוֹב, וּלְשִׁמְחַת עוֹלָם וָחֶסֶד.]
verses.english: Let those who fear the Lord (wait for) goodness, and for eternal joy and grace.

verses.hebrew:
[הַבִּיטוּ לְדוֹרוֹת רִאשׂוֹנִים, מִי הֶאֱמִין בַּיהֹוָה וַיֵּבוֹשׁ.]
(י) [אוֹ מִי בָּטַח בּוֹ וְנֶעֱזַב, אוֹ מִי קָרָא אֵלָיו וְלֹא נֶעֱנָה.]
verses.english: Look to the earlier generations, was there any that trusted in the Lord and was disgraced? (10) Or any who relied on God and was abandoned, or any who called on God and was not answered?

verses.hebrew: [כִּי רָחוּם וְחַנּוּן יְהֹוָה, וְסוֹלֵחַ לַעֲוֹנוֹת וּמוֹשִׁיעַ בְּעֵת צָרָה.]
verses.english: For compassionate and merciful is the Lord, forgiving transgressions and granting deliverance in an hour of need.

verses.hebrew: [אוֹי לְרַכֵּי לֵב וּרְפֵה יָדָיִם, וְלָרָשָׁע עִקֵּשׁ דְּרָכַיִם.]
verses.english: Woe to the weak-willed and those quick to give up, and to the wicked one with twisted ways.

verses.hebrew: [אוֹי לְלֵב אֲשֶׁר לֹא יַאֲמִין, וְאַף הוּא לֹא יָקוּם.]
verses.english: Woe to the untrusting heart, it will surely not rise up.

verses.hebrew: [אוֹי לָכֶם אוֹבְדֵי תִּקְוָה, וּמַה תַּעֲשׂוּ בִּפְקוֹד יְהֹוָה.]
verses.english: Woe to you who lost hope, what will you do at the reckoning of the Lord?!

verses.hebrew: [יִרְאֵי יְהֹוָה לֹא יַמְרוּ בִּדְרָכָיו, וְאוֹהֲבָיו יִצְרוּ אָרְחוֹתָיו.]
verses.english: Those who fear the Lord will not change [boast] in his ways, and those who love him will preserve his paths.

verses.hebrew: [יִרְאֵי יְהֹוָה יְבַקְּשׁוּ רְצוֹנוֹ, וְאֹהֲבָיו יִלְמְדוּ תוֹרָתוֹ.]
verses.english: Those who fear the Lord will seek his will, and those who love him will learn his law.

verses.hebrew: [יִרְאֵי יְהֹוָה יָכִינוּ לְבָבָם, וּלְפָנָיו יַכְנִיעוּ רוּחָם.]
verses.english: Those who fear the Lord will prepare their hearts, and before him humble their spirit.

verses.hebrew: [נִפֹּל בְּיַד יְהֹוָה וְלֹא בְּיַד אָדָם, כִּי כְּגָדְלוֹ כֵּן חַסְדּוֹ.]
verses.english: We will fall by the hands of the Lord and not by the hands of humanity; for as he is great, so is his kindness.

2.heVersionTitle: Ben Sira, David Kahana ed. -- Wikisource

verses.hebrew: [שִׁמְעוּ בָנִים מִשְׁפַט אָב, וַעֲשׂוּ לְמַעַן תִּחְיוּ.]
verses.english: Listen to a father’s commands, and act accordingly so that you may live.

verses.hebrew: [כִּי יְהֹוָה כִּבֵּד הָאָב לִפְנֵי הַבָּנִים, וּמִשְׁפַּט הָאֵם קִיֵּם עַל יְלָדֶיהָ.]
verses.english: For the Lord has glorified father over children, and he has upheld a mother’s judgment over her children.

verses.hebrew: [מְכַבֵּד אָב תְּכֻפַּר חַטָּאתוֹ, וְגוֹנֵז אוֹצָר מְכַבֵּד אִמּוֹ.]
verses.english: He who honors father will atone his sins; like one who hides a treasure is he who honors his mother.

verses.hebrew: [מְכַבֵּד אָבִיו יִשְׂמַח בִּבְנוֹ, וּתְפִלָתוֹ יִשְׁמַע וְיַעֲנֶה.]
verses.english: He who honors father will be happy in his sons, and his prayers will be heard & answered.

verses.hebrew: [מְכַבֵּד אָבִיו יִרְבּוּ יָמָיו, וּגְמוּל אֱלֹהִים עַל] מְכַבֵּד אִמּוֹ.
verses.english: . . . . . . . . that honoureth his mother.

verses.hebrew: בְּנִי בְּמַאֲמָר וּבְמַעֲשֶׂה כַּבֵּד אָבִיךָ, עֲבוּר יַשִׂיגוּךָ כֹּל בְּרָכוֹת.
verses.english: My son, in word and in deed honour thy father; That all blessings may overtake thee.

verses.hebrew: בִּרְכַת אָב תְּיַסֵּד שֹׁרֶשׁ, וְקִלְלַת אֵם תִּנְתּשׁ נֶטַע.
verses.english: The blessing of a father settleth the root; But the curse of a mother plucketh up the plant.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּתְכַּבֵּד בְּקְלוֹן אָבִיךָ, כִּי לֹא כָבוֹד הוּא לָךְ.
verses.english: Take not honour to thyself by the shame of thy father; For it is no honour unto thee.

verses.hebrew: כְּבוֹד אִישׁ כִּבּוּד אָבִיו, וּמַרְבֶּה חֵטְא מְקַלֵּל אִמּוֹ.
verses.english: The honour of his father is a man's honour; And he that curseth his mother doth greatly sin.

verses.hebrew: בְּנִי הִתְחַזֵּק בִּכִבּוּד אָבִיךָ, וְאַל תַּעַזְבֵהוּ כָּל יְמֵי חַיֶּיךָ.
verses.english: My son, be stedfast in honouring thy father; And forsake him not all the days of thy life.

verses.hebrew: וְגַם אִישׁ יֶחְסַר מַדָּעוֹ עֲזָב לוֹ, וְאַל תַּכְלִים אוֹתוֹ כָּל יְמֵי חַיָיו.
verses.english: Yea, and though his mind fail, bear with (or help) him; And dishonour him not all the days of his life (H).

verses.hebrew: צִדְקַת אָב לֹא תִּמָּחֶה, וּתְמוּר חַטָּאת הִיא תְּנַתֵּעַ.
verses.english: Benefaction to a father shall not be blotted out; But it shall be planted instead of sin.

verses.hebrew: בְּיוֹם צָרָה תִּזָּכֵר לָךְ, כְּחֹם עַל כְּפוֹר לְהַשְׁבִּית עֲוֹנֶיךָ.
verses.english: In the day of affliction it shall be remembered unto thee, As heat upon hoar frost, to do away thine iniquities.

verses.hebrew: כִּי מֵזִיד בּוֹזֶה אָבִיו, וּמַכְעִיס בּוֹרְאוֹ מְקַלֵּל אִמּוֹ.
verses.english: For he that despiseth his father doeth presumptuously; And he that curseth his mother angereth his Creator.

verses.hebrew: בְּנִי בְּעָשְׁרְךָ הִתְהַלֵּךְ בַּעֲנָוָה, וְתֵאָהֵב מִנּוֹתֵן מַתָּנוֹת.
verses.english: My son, in thy wealth walk in meekness (H S); And thou shalt be more beloved than he that giveth gifts.

verses.hebrew: מַעֵט נַפְשְךָ מִכָּל גְּדוּלָה, וְלִפְנֵי אֵל תִּמְצָא רַחֲמִים.
verses.english: Minish thy soul from all the great things of the world; And before God thou shalt find mercy.

verses.hebrew: כִּי רַבִּים רַחֲמֵי אֱלֹהִים, וְלַעֲנָוִים יְגַלֶּה סוֹדוֹ.
verses.english: For great is the mercy of God; And he revealeth his secret to the meek.

verses.hebrew: פְּלָאוֹת מִמְּךָ אַל תִּדְרוֹשׁ, וּמְכֻסֶּה מִמְּךָ אַל תַּחְקוֹר.
verses.english: Search not the things that are too wonderful for thee; And seek not that which is hid from thee.

verses.hebrew: בַּמֶּה שֶׁהוּרְשֵׁיתָ הִתְבּוֹנֵן, וְאֵין לְךָ עֵסֶק בְּנִסְתָּרוֹת.
verses.english: What thou art permitted, think thereupon; But thou hast no business with the secret things.

verses.hebrew: בְּיוֹתֵר מִמְּךָ אַל תַּמֵּר, כִּי רַב מִמְּךָ הָרְאֵיתָ.
verses.english: And intrude not into that which is beyond thee; For thou hast been shewed that which is too great for thee.

verses.hebrew: כִּי רַבִּים עֶשְׁתּוֹנֵי בְּנֵי אָדָם, וְדִמְיוֹנוֹת רָעוֹת מַתְעוֹת.
verses.english: For many are the conceits of the sons of men; And the imaginations of thoughts (H) that make them to err.

verses.hebrew: לֵב כָּבֵד תִּבְאַשׁ אַחֲרִיתוֹ, וְאֹוהֵב טוֹבוֹת יִנְהַג בָּהֶם.
verses.english: A hard heart shall fare ill at the last; But he that loveth good things will guide himself therein.

verses.hebrew: לֵב כָּבֵד יִרְבּוּ מַכְאֹבָיו, וּמִתְהוֹלֵל מוֹסִיף עָוֹן עַל עָוֹן.
verses.english: Many are the sorrows of a hard heart; And he that is confident addeth iniquity to iniquity.

verses.hebrew: בְּאֵין אִישׁוֹן יֶחְסַר אוֹר, וּבְאֵין דַעַת תֶּחְסַר חָכְמָה.
verses.english: Without the apple of the eye light faileth; And without knowledge wisdom faileth.

verses.hebrew: אַל תָּרוּץ לְרַפְּאוֹת מַכַּת לֵץ, כִּי אֵין לָהּ רְפוּאָה, כִּי מִנֶּטַע רַע נִטְעוֹ.
verses.english: Haste not to heal the stroke of the scorner; For there is no healing it: for he is a plant of evil planting.

verses.hebrew: לֵב חָכָם יָבִין מִשְׁלֵי חֲכָמִים, וְאֹזֶן מַקְשֶׁבֶת לְחָכְמָה תִּשְׂמָח.
verses.english: A wise heart will understand parables of the wise; And the ear that hearkeneth to wisdom shall rejoice.

verses.hebrew: אש לוהטת יכבו מים כן צדקה תכפר חטאת.
verses.english: Waters quench flaming fire; So righteousness maketh atonement for sin.

verses.hebrew: פועל טוב יקראנו בדרכיו ובעת מוטו ימצא משען.
verses.english: Whoso doeth good, it shall meet him in his ways (?); And in the time that he tottereth he shall find a stay.

verses.hebrew: בְּנִי אַל תִּלְעַג לְחַיֵּי עָנִי, וְאַל תַּדְאִיב נֶפֶשׁ עָנֵי וּמַר נָפֶשׁ.
verses.english: My son, mock not at the life of the poor (or of affliction); And make not the soul of him that is poor and bitter of soul (H) to pine.

verses.hebrew: דֹּוֶוה נֶפֶשׁ חֲסֵרָה אַל תָּפוּחַ, וְאַל תִּתְעַלֵּם מִמְּדֻכְדַּךְ נָפֶשׁ.
verses.english: Vex not the spirit (?) of the soul that lacketh; And hide not thyself from one that is crushed (?) in soul.

verses.hebrew: אַל [תַּחְמִיר] מְעֵי דָךְ, וְקֶרֶב עָנִי אַל תַּכְאִיב.
verses.english: Trouble not the bowels of him that is humbled; And pain not the inward part of the poor.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּמְנַע מַתָּן מִמִּסְכֵּנֶךָ, וְלֹא תִבְזֶה שְׁאֵלוֹת דָּל, וְלֹא תִתֵּן לוֹ מָקוֹם לְקַלְלֶךָ.
verses.english: Withhold not a gift from thy needy; And thou shalt not despise the supplications of the miserable; And thou shalt not give him place to curse thee.

verses.hebrew: צוֹעֵק מַר רוּחַ בִּכְאֵב נַפְשׁוֹ, וּבְקוֹל צַעֲקָתוֹ יִשְׁמַע צוּרוֹ.
verses.english: He that is bitter of spirit crieth in the anguish of his soul; And his Rock (H) shall hear the voice of his cry.

verses.hebrew: הַאֲהֵב נַפְשְׁךָ לָעֵדָה, וּלְשִׁלְטוֹן עוֹד הַאֲכֵף רֹאשׁ.
verses.english: Make thyself (?) beloved of the congregation; And to a potentate moreover bow the head.

verses.hebrew: הַט לֶעָנִי אָזְנֶךָ, וַהֲשִׁיבֵהוּ שָׁלוֹם בַּעֲנָוָה.
verses.english: Incline thine ear to the poor; And answer him Peace with meekness.

verses.hebrew: הוֹשַׁע מוּצָק מִמְּצִיקָיו, וְאַל תָּקוֹץ רוּחֲךָ בְּמִשְׁפַט יֹשֶׁר.
verses.english: Save the oppressed from his oppressors; And let not thy spirit loathe right judgement.

verses.hebrew: הֱיֵה כְאָב לִיתוֹמִים, וּתְמוּר בַּעַל לְאַלְמָנוֹת.
verses.english: Be as a father to orphans; And instead of a husband to widows.

verses.hebrew: וְאֵל יִקְרָאֲךָ בֵּן, וְיָחְנְךָ וְיַצִּילְךָ מִשָׁחַת.
verses.english: And God shall call thee Son; And shall be gracious to thee, and deliver thee from the pit.

verses.hebrew: חָכְמוֹת לִמְּדָה בָנֶיהָ, וְתָעִיד לְכָל מְבִינִים בָּהּ.
verses.english: Wisdom teacheth (H) her sons; And testifieth (H) to all that attend to her.

verses.hebrew: אֹהֲבֶיהָ אָהֲבוּ חַיִּים, וּמְבַקְשֶׁיהָ יָפִיקוּ רָצוֹן מֵיהֹוָה.
verses.english: They that love her love life; And they that seek her shall obtain favour from the Lord.

verses.hebrew: וְתֹמְכֶיהָ יִמְצְאוּ כָבוֹד מֵיהֹוָה, וְיֻחַנּוּ בְּבִרְכַּת יְהֹוָה.
verses.english: And they that retain her shall find honour from the Lord; And shall have grace shewed them by the blessing of the Lord.

verses.hebrew: מְשָׁרְתֵי קֹדֶשׁ מְשָׁרְתֶיהָ, וֵאלֹהִים בֵּית [מוֹשָׁבָהּ אָהֵב].
verses.english: Ministers of holiness are her ministers; And God loveth them that love her (?).

verses.hebrew: שׁוֹמֵעַ לִי יִשׁפֹּט אֱמֶת, וּמַאֲזִין לִי יִיחַן בַּחֲדָרַי מִבָּיִת.
verses.english: He that heareth me shall judge truth (G nations); And he that giveth ear to me shall dwell in my chamber within.

verses.hebrew: כִּי בְהִתְנַכֵּר אֵלֵךְ עִמּוֹ, וּלְפָנִים אֶבְחָרֶנּוּ בְנִסְיוֹנוֹת.
verses.english: For I will go with him, making myself strange; And at the first I (H he) will try him with temptations.

verses.hebrew: וְעַד עֵת יִמָּלֵא לִבּוֹ בִּי, אָשׁוּב אֲאַשְּׁרֶנּוֹ וְגָלִיתִי לוֹ מִסְתָּרִי.
verses.english: And what time his heart is filled with me; I will turn and direct him, And reveal unto him of my secrets.

verses.hebrew: אִם יָסוּר וּנְטוֹתֵיהוּ, וַאֲסַרְתִיהוּ בָאֲסוּרִים.
verses.english: If he turn away and decline from me (?), I will train him with fetters (or restraints).

verses.hebrew: אִם יָסוּר מֵאַחֲרַי אַשׁלִיכֶנּוּ, וְאַסְגִּירֶנּוּ לַשֹׁדְדִים.
verses.english: If he turn away from after me, I will cast him off, and deliver him to the spoilers.

verses.hebrew: בְּנִי עֵת הָמוֹן שְׁמֹר וּפְחַד מִרָע, וְאֶל נַפְשְׁךָ אַל תֵּבוֹשׁ.
verses.english: My son, observe season and time (?); And fear evil, and be not shamefaced unto thyself.

verses.hebrew: כִּי יֵשׁ בֹּשֶׁת מַשְׂאֵת עָוֹן, וְיֵשׁ בֹּשֶׁת כָּבוֹד וָחֵן.
verses.english: For there is a shame (?) that ladeth with iniquity; And there is a shame that is honour and grace.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּשָּׂא פָנֶיךָ עַל נַפְשֶׁךָ, וְאַל תִּכָּשֵׁל לְמִכְשׁוֹלֶיךָ.
verses.english: Have not respect of thine own person; And stumble (H) not at thine offences.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּמְנַע דִּבֵּר בָּעוֹלָם, וְאַל תַּצְפִּין אֶת חָכְמָתֶךָ.
verses.english: Withhold not a word (or to speak) in season (?); Nor ever conceal thy wisdom.

verses.hebrew: כִּי בְאֹמֶר נוֹדַעַת חָכְמָה, וּתְבוּנָה בְּמַעֲנֵה לָשׁוֹן.
verses.english: For by speech wisdom is made known; And understanding by the answer of the tongue.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּסָּרֵב עִם הָאֵל, וְאֶל אֱלֹהִים הִכָּנֵעַ.
verses.english: Gainsay not the truth (H God); And submit thyself unto God.

verses.hebrew: אַל תֵּבוֹשׁ לָשׁוּב מֵעָוֹן, וְאַל תַּעֲמוֹד לִפְנֵי שִׁבֹּלֶת.
verses.english: Be not ashamed to turn from iniquity; And stand not against a stream.

verses.hebrew: אַל תַּצַּע לְנָבָל נַפְשֶׁךָ, וְאַל תַּאֲמֵן לִפְּנֵי מוֹשְׁלִים.
verses.english: Lay not thyself down for a fool to tread upon; And be not contrary before rulers.

verses.hebrew: אַל תֵּשֵׁב עִם שׁוֹפֵט עַוָּל, כִּי כַאֲשֶׁר כִּרְצוֹנוֹ תִּשְׁפּוֹט עִמּוֹ.
verses.english: Sit not with one that judgeth unrighteously; For according to his pleasure (?) thou shalt judge with him.

verses.hebrew: עַד הַמָּוֶת הִנָּצֵה עַל הַצֶּדֶק, וַיהֹוָה נִלְחָם לָךְ.
verses.english: Unto death contend (?) for justice; And the Lord shall fight for thee.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּקָּרֵא בַּעַל שְׁתַּיִם, וְאֶל לְשׁוֹנְךָ אַל תַּרְגֵּל.
verses.english: Be not called a double dealer; And slander not with (?) thy tongue.

verses.hebrew: אַל תְּהִי גַבְהָן בִּלְשׁוֹנֶךָ, וְרָפוּי וְרָשִׁישׁ בִּמְלַאכְתֶּךָ.
verses.english: Be not boastful with thy tongue; And slack and negligent (?) in thy business.

verses.hebrew: אַל תְּהִי כְּכֶלֶב בְּבֵיתֶךָ, וּמוּזָר וּמִתְיָרֵא בִמְלַאכְתֶּךָ.
verses.english: Be not as a dog (G lion) in thine house; And strange and fearful in thy business.

verses.hebrew: אַל תְּהִי יָדְךָ פְתוּחָה לָקַחַת, וּקְפוּצָה בְּתִתְּךָ מַתָּן.
verses.english: Let not thine hand be opened to receive; And clenched in the midst of giving.

4.heVersionTitle: Ben Sira, David Kahana ed. -- Wikisource

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּשָּׁעֵן עַל חֵילֶךָ, וְאַל תֹּאמַר יֵשׁ לְאֵל יָדִי.
verses.english: Stay not upon thy strength (or wealth); And say not, It is in the power of my hand.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּשָּׁעֵן עַל כֹּחֶךָ, לָלֶכֶת אַחַר תַּאֲוַת נַפְשֶׁךָ.
verses.english: Stay not upon thy force; To go after the desire of thy soul.

verses.hebrew: אַל תֵּלֵךְ אַחֲרֵי לִבְּךָ וְעֵינֵיךָ, לָלֶכֶת בַּחֲמוּדוֹת רָעָה.
verses.english: Go not after thy heart and thine eyes; To walk in the pleasures of wickedness.

verses.hebrew: אַל תֹּאמַר מִי יוּכַל כֹּחוֹ, כִּי יְהֹוָה מְבַקֵּשׁ נִרְדָּפִים.
verses.english: Say not, Who can withstand my (G S) strength? For the Lord avengeth (H seeketh) them that are persecuted.

verses.hebrew: אַל תֹּאמַר חָטָאתִי, וְמַה יֵעָשֶה לִי – מְאוּמָה, כִּי אֵל אֶרֶךְ אַפַּיִם הוּא.
verses.english: Say not, I have sinned, and who (?) shall do aught unto me, For God is slow to anger?

verses.hebrew: אַל תֹּאמַר רַחוּם יהוה, וְכָל עֲוֹנוֹתַי יִמְחֶה.
verses.english: Say not, The Lord is merciful; And he will blot out all mine iniquities.

verses.hebrew: אֶל סְלִיחָה אַל תִּבְטָח, לְהוֹסִיף עָוֹן עַל עָוֹן.
verses.english: Trust not to forgiveness; To add iniquity to iniquity.

verses.hebrew: וְאָמַרְתָּ רַחֲמָיו רַבִּים, לְרֹב עֲוֹנוֹתַי יִסְלָח.
verses.english: Nor say, His mercy is great: He will forgive the multitude of mine iniquities.

verses.hebrew: כִּי רַחֲמִים וְאַף עִמּוֹ, וְאֵל רְשָעִים יָנוּחַ רָגְזוֹ.
verses.english: For mercy and anger are with him; And his displeasure shall rest upon (?) the wicked.

verses.hebrew: אַל תְּאַחֵר לָשׁוּב אֵלָיו, וְאַל תִּתְעַבֵּר מִיּוֹם אֶל יוֹם.
verses.english: Make no tarrying to turn unto him; And put not off (?) from day to day.

verses.hebrew: כִּי פִתאוֹם יֵצֵא זַעְמוֹ, וּבְעֵת נָקָם תִּסָּפֶה.
verses.english: For suddenly shall his indignation go forth; And in the day of vengeance thou shalt perish.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּבְטַח עַל נִכְסֵי שֶׁקֶר, כִּי לֹא יוֹעִילוּ בְּיוֹם עֶבְרָה.
verses.english: Trust not on riches of falsehood; For they shall not profit in the day of wrath.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּהְיֶה זוֹרֶה לְכָל רוּחַ, וּפוֹנֶה דֶרֶך שִׁבֹּלֶת.
verses.english: Be not winnowing with every wind, And turning the way of the stream (H).

verses.hebrew: הֱיֶה סָמוּךְ עַל דַּעְתֶּךָ, וְאֶחָד יְהִי דְבָרֶךָ.
verses.english: Be assured in thine own mind; And let thy word be one.

verses.hebrew: הֱיֶה מְמַהֵר לְהַאֲזִין, וּבְאֶרֶךְ רוּחַ הָשֵׁב פִּתְגָּם.
verses.english: Be swift to give ear; And with patience of spirit return answer.

verses.hebrew: אִם יֵשׁ אִתְּךָ עֲנֵה רֵעֶךָ, וְאִם אַיִן יָדְךָ עַל פִּיךָ.
verses.english: If it be in thee, answer thy neighbour; And if not, be thy hand upon thy mouth.

verses.hebrew: כָּבוֹד וְקָלוֹן בְּיַד בּוֹטֵא, וּלְשׁוֹן אָדָם מַפַּלְתּוֹ.
verses.english: Honour and disgrace are in the hand (?) of talk; And the tongue of a man is his fall.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּקָּרֵא בַּעַל שְׁתַּיִם, וּבִלְשׁוֹנְךָ אַל תְּרַגֵּל רֵעַ.
verses.english: Be not called a double dealer; And with thy tongue slander not a neighbour.

verses.hebrew: כִּי עַל גַּנָּב נִבְרְאָה בֹשֶׁת חֶרְפָּה, רֵעֵהוּ – בַּעַל שְׁתַּיִם.
verses.english: For for the thief was created shame; And sore reproach for (G S) the double dealer.

verses.hebrew: מְעַט וְהַרְבֵּה אַל תַּשְׁחֵת, וְתַחַת אוֹהֵב אַל תְּהִי שׂוֹנֵא.
verses.english: Little or much do not corruptly (H); And instead of a friend become not an enemy.

5.heVersionTitle: Ben Sira, David Kahana ed. -- Wikisource

verses.hebrew: שֵׁם רַע וְקָלוֹן תּוֹרִישׁ חֶרְפָּה, כֵּן אִישׁ רַע בַּעַל שְׁתָּיִם.
verses.english: Reproach shall inherit (H) an evil name and disgrace: So an evil man that is a double dealer.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּפּוֹל בְּיַד נַפְשְׁךָ, וּתְעַבֶּה חֵילֵךָ עָלֶיךָ.
verses.english: Fall not into the hand of thine appetite; That it should consume thy strength like an ox (?).

verses.hebrew: עָלֶיךָ תֹּאכַל וּפֶרְיְךָ תְּשָׁרֵשׁ, וְהִנִיחַתְךָ כְּעֵץ יָבֵשׁ.
verses.english: It shall eat thy leaves and uproot thy fruit; And leave thee like a dry tree.

verses.hebrew: כִּי נֶפֶש עַזָה תַּשְׁחִית בְּעָלֶיהָ, וְשִׂמְחַת שׂוֹנֵא תַּשִּׂיגֵם.
verses.english: For fierce appetite corrupteth them that have it; And the joy of an enemy overtaketh (H) them.

verses.hebrew: חֵךְ עָרֵב יַרְבֶּה אוֹהֵב, וּשִׂפְתֵי חֵן שׁוֹאֲלֵי שָׁלוֹם.
verses.english: Many a friend doth a sweet palate make; And gracious lips that greet (?) with peace.

verses.hebrew: אַנְשֵׁי שְׁלוֹמְךָ יִהְיוּ רַבִּים, וּבַעַל סוֹדְךָ אֶחַד מֵאָלֶף.
verses.english: Be they that are at peace with thee many; But he that hath thy secret one of a thousand.

verses.hebrew: קָנִיתָ אוֹהֵב בְּנִסָּיוֹן קְנֵהוּ, וְאַל תְּמַהֵר לִבְטוֹחַ עָלָיו.
verses.english: Hast thou gotten a friend? get him in trial (?); And be not in haste to trust on him.

verses.hebrew: כִּי יֵשׁ אוֹהֵב כְּפִי עֵת, וְאַל יַעֲמוֹד בְּיוֹם צָרָה.
verses.english: For there is a friend that is for a season; And that will not (?) continue in the day of affliction.

verses.hebrew: יֵשׁ אוֹהֵב נֶהְפָּךְ לְשׂוֹנֵא, וְאֶת רִיב חֶרְפָּתְךָ יַחְשֹׂף.
verses.english: There is a friend that turneth to an enemy; And he will make bare the strife to thy reproach.

verses.hebrew: יֵשׁ אוֹהֵב חָבֵר שֻׁלְחָן, וְלֹא יִמָּצֵא בְּיוֹם רָעָה.
verses.english: There is a friend that is a companion at the table; But he will not be found in the day of adversity.

verses.hebrew: בְּטוֹבָתְךָ הוּא כָמוֹךָ, וּבְרָעָתְךָ יִתְנַדֶּה מִמֶּךָּ.
verses.english: In thy prosperity he is as thou art; And in thine adversity he will remove away from thee.

verses.hebrew: אִם תַּשִּׂיגְךָ רָעָה, יֵהָפֵךְ בְּךָ וּמִפָּנֶיךָ יִסָּתֵר.
verses.english: If evil overtake thee, he will turn against thee; And will hide himself from thy face.

verses.hebrew: מִשֹּׂנְאֶיךָ הִבָּדֵל, וּמֵאֹהֲבֶיָך הֵשָּׁמֵר.
verses.english: Separate thyself from thine enemies; And beware of thy friends.

verses.hebrew: אוֹהֵב אֱמוּנָה אוֹהֵב תְּקוֹף, וּמוֹצְאוֹ מָצָא הוֹן.
verses.english: A faithful friend is a firm friend; And he that findeth him hath found a treasure.

verses.hebrew: לְאוֹהֵב אֱמוּנָה אֵין מְחִיר, וְאֵין מִשְׁקָל לְטוֹבָתוֹ.
verses.english: There is no exchange for a faithful friend; Nor price that can be weighed for his goodness.

verses.hebrew: צְרוֹר חַיִּים אוֹהֵב אֱמוּנָה, יְרֵא וְאַל יַשִּׂיגֵם.
verses.english: A faithful friend is a balm (G S) of life; He that feareth God shall obtain it.

verses.hebrew: כִּי כָמוֹהוּ כֵּן רֵעֵהוּ, וּכִשְׁמוֹ כֵּן מַעֲשָׂיו.
verses.english: For as he is, so is his neighbour; And as his name, so are his works.

verses.hebrew: בְּנִי מִנְּעוּרֶיךָ קַח לֶקַח, וְעַד שֵׂיבָה תַּשִּׂיג חָכְמָה.
verses.english: Child, from your youth acquire learning, and until gray hairs reach for wisdom.

verses.hebrew: כְּחוֹרֵשׁ וּכְקוֹצֵר קְרַב אֵלֶיהָ, וְקַוֵּה לְרֹב תְּבוּאָתָהּ. כִּי בַעֲבֹדָתָהּ מְעַט תַּעֲבוֹד, וּלְמָחָר תֹּאכַל פִּרְיָהּ.
verses.english: As one that plougheth and as one that reapeth approach unto her; And wait for the abundance of her increase. For in the tillage of her thou shalt toil a little; And on the morrow (H) thou shalt eat her fruit.

verses.hebrew: עֲקֻבָּה הִיא לָאֱוִיל, וְלֹא יְכַלְכְּלֶנָּה חֲסַר לֵב.
verses.english: Rough is she to the fool; And he that is void of understanding cannot bear her.

verses.hebrew: כְּאֶבֶן מַשָּׂא תִּהְיֶה עָלָיו, וְלֹא יְאַחֵר לְהַשְׁלִיכָה.
verses.english: As a burdensome weight shall she be upon him; And he will not tarry to cast her away.

verses.hebrew: כִּי הַמּוּסָר בִּשְׁמָהּ כֵּן הִיא, וְלֹא לְרַבִּים הִיא נְכוֹחָה.
verses.english: For discipline is according to its (?) name; And to the more part she is not plain (or right).

verses.hebrew: כלי יוצר לבער כבשן וכמהו איש על חשבונו:
verses.english: A potter's vessel is for the furnace to bake (?); And like unto it, a man is according to his thought.

verses.hebrew: על עבודת עץ יהי פרי כן חשבון על יצר אחד:
verses.english: Upon the bough (?) of a tree will be its fruit; So the thought of a man is according to his mind (?).

verses.hebrew: הַט שִׁכְמְךָ וְשָׂאֶהָ, וְאַל תָּקוֹץ בְּתַחְבּוּלוֹתֶיהָ.
verses.english: Incline thy shoulder, and carry her; And loathe not her cords (?).

verses.hebrew: דְּרֹש וַחֲקֹר בַּקֵּש וּמְצָא, וְהֶחֱזַקְתָהּ וְאַל תַּרְפֶּהָ.
verses.english: Search and examine, seek and find; And hold her fast, and let her not go.

verses.hebrew: כִּי לְאָחוֹר תִּמְצָא מְנוּחָתָהּ, וְתֵהָפֵךְ לְךָ לְתַעֲנוּג.
verses.english: For afterward thou shalt find her rest; And she (?) shall turn to a delight unto thee.

verses.hebrew: וְהָיְתָה לְךָ רִשְׁתָּהּ מְכוֹן עֹז, וְחַבְלֹתֶיהָ בִּגְדֵי כָתֶם.
verses.english: And her net shall be to thee a strong defence; And her cordage robes of fine gold.

verses.hebrew: עֻלֵּי זָהָב עֻלָּהּ, וּמוֹסְרוֹתֶיהָ פְּתִיל תְּכֵלֶת.
verses.english: Her yoke (G Upon her) is an ornament (G) of gold; And her bands are thread of purple.

verses.hebrew: בִּגְדֵי כָבוֹד תִלְבְּשֶׁנָּה, וַעֲטֶרֶת תִּפְאֶרֶת תְּעַטְּרֶנָּה.
verses.english: Thou shalt put her on as robes of honour; And crown thyself with her as a crown of beauty.

verses.hebrew: אִם תַּחְפּוֹץ בְּנִי תִּתְחַכָּם, וְאִם תָּשִׂים לִבְּךָ תַּעֲרֹם.
verses.english: If thou be desirous, my son, thou mayest become wise; And if thou apply thy heart, thou shalt be prudent.

verses.hebrew: אִם תּוֹבֵא לִשְׁמֹעַ, וְתֵט אָזְנְךָ תִּוָּסֵר.
verses.english: If thou art wishful to hear (H); And incline thine ear (H), thou shalt be instructed.

verses.hebrew: כָּל שִׂיחָה חֲפוֹץ לִשְׁמֹעַ, וּמְשַׁל בִּינָה אַל יֵצְאֶךָּ.
verses.english: Be desirous to hear all discourse; And let no proverb of understanding escape thee.

verses.hebrew: רְאֵה מִי יָבִין וְשַׁחֲרֵהוּ, וְתִשְׁחוֹק בְּסִפּוֹ רַגְלְךָ.
verses.english: See who (?) hath understanding, and seek him early; And let thy foot wear my (H) threshold.

verses.hebrew: וְהִתְבּוֹנַנְתָּ בְּיִרְאַת עֶלְיוֹן וּבְמִצוֹתָיו, וֶהְגֵה תָמִיד.
verses.english: And let thy mind be upon the fear of the Most High; And meditate (?) in his commandments continually.

verses.hebrew: וְהוּא יָבִין לִבֶּךָ, וַאֲשֶׁר אִוִּיתָה יְחַכְּמֶךָּ.
verses.english: And he shall make thy heart discerning (H); And make thee wise according as thou desirest.

6.heVersionTitle: Ben Sira, David Kahana ed. -- Wikisource

verses.hebrew: אַל תַּעַשׂ רָעָה וְאַל יַשִּׂיגְךָ רָעָה, הַרְחֵק מֵעָוֹן וְיֵט מִמְּךָ.
verses.english: Do not evil to thyself, and evil shall not (?) overtake thee; Keep far from iniquity, and it shall turn aside from thee.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּזְרַע חֲרוּשֵׁי עָוֶל עַל אָח, פֶּן תִּקְצְרֵהוּ שִׁבְעָתָיִם.
verses.english: Sow not upon the furrows of unrighteousness (?); Lest thou reap it sevenfold.

verses.hebrew: אַל תְּבַקֵּשׁ מֵאֵל מֶמְשֶׁלַת, וְכֵן מִמֶּלֶךְ מוֹשַׁב כָּבוֹד.
verses.english: Seek not of God dominion; Nor likewise of a king a seat of honour.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּצְטַדֵּק לִפְנֵי מֶלֶךְ, וּמִפְּנֵי מֶלֶךְ אַל תִּתְבּוֹנֵן.
verses.english: Justify not thyself before God (H a king); And before a king profess not understanding.

verses.hebrew: אַל תְּבַקֵּשׁ לִהְיוֹת מוֹשֵׁל, אִם אֵין לְךָ חַיִל לְהַשְׁבִּית זָדוֹן.
verses.english: Seek not to be a ruler; If thou hast not ability to quell pride.

verses.hebrew: פֶּן תָגוּר מִפְּנֵי נָדִיב, וְנָתוּן בֶּצַע בִּתְמִימִיךָ.
verses.english: Lest thou fear the person of the noble; And suffer lucre to corrupt thine integrity (?).

verses.hebrew: אַל תַּרְשִׁיעֲךָ בַּעֲדַת שַׁעֲרֵי אֵל, וְאַל תַּפִּילְךָ בַּקְּהִלָּה.
verses.english: Condemn not thyself in the congregation at the gate (?); And cast not thyself down in the assembly.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּקְשׁוֹר לְשָׁנוֹת חֵטְ, כִּי בְאַחַת לֹא תִנָּקֶה.
verses.english: Conspire not to commit a second sin; For in one thou shalt not be unpunished.

verses.hebrew: אַל תָּאִיץ בַּצָּבָא, מְלֶאכֶת עֲבֹדָה הִיא מֵאֵל נֶחֱלָקָה.
verses.english: Loathe not appointed service of laborious work; For it hath been apportioned of God (?).

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּתְקַצֵּר בַּתְּפִלָּה וּבִצְדָקָה אַל תִּתְעַבָּר.
verses.english: Be not impatient (H short) in prayer; And in almsgiving hesitate not (?).

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּבֶז לֶאֱנוֹשׁ בְּמַר רוּחַ, זְכוֹר כִּי יֵשׁ מֵרִים וּמַשְׁפִּיל.
verses.english: Despise not a man that is in bitterness of spirit; Remember that there is one that lifteth up and casteth down.

verses.hebrew: אַל תַּחֲרוֹשׁ חָמָס עַל אָח, וְכֵן עַל רֵעַ וְחָבֵר יַחְדָּו.
verses.english: Devise not injury against a brother; And likewise neither against a companion nor a neighbour.

verses.hebrew: אַל תַּחְפֹּץ לְכַחֵש עַל כָּחַש, כִּי תִקְוָתוֹ לֹא תִנְעָם.
verses.english: Love not to make any manner of (?) lie; For the consequence (H hope) thereof shall not be pleasant.

verses.hebrew: אַל תְּסַוֵּר בַּעֲדַת שָׂרִים, וְאַל תִּישֶׁן דָּבָר בַּתְּפִלָּה.
verses.english: Prate (?) not (or Be not familiar) in a congregation of princes; And repeat (?) not a word in prayer.

verses.hebrew: אַל תַּחְשׁוֹבְךָ בָּמֳתֵי עָם, זְכוֹר עִבָּרוֹן לֹא יִתְעַבָּר.
verses.english: Esteem not thyself among the men of thy (?) people; Remember that wrath will not tarry (?).

verses.hebrew: מְאֹד מְאֹד הַשְׁפִּיל גַּאֲוָה, כִּי תִקְוַת אֱנוֹשׁ רִמָּה.
verses.english: Abase pride very exceedingly; For the hope of man is the worm (H S).

verses.hebrew: אַל תָּאִיץ לֵאמֹר לִי - פָרֶץ, גֹּל אֶל אֵל וּרְצֵה דַרְכּוֹ.
verses.english: Be not in haste to say, A breach (?) is upon me; Commit thyself unto God, and delight in his way.

verses.hebrew: אַל תָּמִיר אוֹהֵב בִּמְחִיר, וְאָח תָּלוּי בִּזְהַב אוֹפִיר.
verses.english: Exchange not a friend at a price; Neither a brother that is attached (or doubted) for gold of Ophir.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּמְאַס אִשָּׁה מַשְׁכֶּלֶת, וְטוֹבַת חֵן מִפְּנִינִים.
verses.english: Despise (or Reject) not a wise wife; Seeing she is well-favoured above rubies.

verses.hebrew: אַל תָּרֵעַ עוֹבֵד אֱמֶת, וְכֵן שׁוֹמֵר נוֹחֵן נַפְשׁוֹ.
verses.english: Evil entreat not a servant that laboureth truly (?); Nor a hireling that giveth his soul (?).

verses.hebrew: עֶבֶד מַשְׂכִּיל חַבֵּב כְּנֶפֶש, וְאַל תִּמְנַע מִמֶּנוּ חֹפֶשׁ.
verses.english: Love a wise servant as thyself: Withhold not liberty from him.

verses.hebrew: בְּהֵמָה לְךָ רְאֵה עֵינֶיךָ, וְאִם אֻמָּנָה הִיא הַעֲמִידָהּ.
verses.english: Hast thou a beast? see that thine eye be upon it (?); And if it be trusty (?), keep it.

verses.hebrew: בָּנִים לְךָ יַסֵּר אוֹתָם, וְשָׂא לָהֶם נָשִׁים בִּנְעוּרֵיהֶם.
verses.english: Hast thou sons? instruct them; And marry wives to them in their youth.

verses.hebrew: בָּנוֹת לְךָ נְצוֹר שְׁאֵרָם, וְאַל תָּאִיר אֲלֵיהֶם פָּנִים.
verses.english: Hast thou daughters? guard their flesh; And make not thy face bright unto them.

verses.hebrew: הוֹצֵא בַת וְיֵצֵא עֵסֶק, וְאֶל גֶּבֶר נָבוֹן חַבְּרָהּ.
verses.english: Give away a daughter, and away with a trouble (?); But join her to a man of understanding.

verses.hebrew: אִשָּׁה לְךָ אַל תְּתַעֲבֶהָ, וּשְׂנוּאָה אַל תַּאֲמֵן בָּהּ.
verses.english: Hast thou a wife? abominate (H) her not; Hast thou one that is hated? trust her not.

verses.hebrew: [בְּכָל לִבְּךָ כַּבֵּד לְאָבִיךָ, וְאֵם יוֹלַדְתְּךָ אַל תִּשֶּׁה.
verses.english: With all thy heart fear . . . . . . . . . . *******

verses.hebrew: זְכוֹר לוּלֵי הֵם, לֹא בָאתָ לָעוֹלָם. וּמָה אַתָּה עוֹשֶׂה לָהֶם, שֶׁהֵם גּוֹמְלִים לָךְ].
verses.english: Remember: If they were not, you would not have come to the world. And what you are doing to them, that they are your rearers.

verses.hebrew: בְּכָל לִבְּך פְּחַד אִל, וְאֶת כֹּהֲנָיו הַקְדִישׁ.
verses.english: With all your heart fear God; And his priests sanctify.

verses.hebrew: בְּכָל מְאֹדְךָ אֱהוֹב עוֹשֶׂךָ, וְאֶת מְשָׁרְתָיו לֹא תַעֲזֹב.
verses.english: With all your means love your maker; And his servers do not forsake.

verses.hebrew: כַּבֵּד אֵל וַהֲדַר כֹּהֵן, וְתֵן חֶלְקָם כַּאֲשֶׁר צֻוֵּיתָה.
verses.english: Honor God and glorify a priest; Give their portions like you were commanded.

verses.hebrew: לֶחֶם אַבִּירִים וּתְרוּמַת יָד, זִבְחֵי צֶדֶק וּתְרוּמַת קֹדֶשׁ.
verses.english: Bread of heroes and gift of a hand; Meat of the righteous and gift of the holy one.

verses.hebrew: וְגַם לְאֶבְיוֹן הוֹשִׁיט יָד, לְמַעַן תִּשְׁלַם בִּרְכָתֶךָ.
verses.english: Also to the needy stretch out a hand; So that you blessing will be repaid.

verses.hebrew: תֵּן מַתָּן לִפְנֵי כָל חָי, וְגַם מִמֵּת אַל תִּמְנַע חָסֶד.
verses.english: Give a gift to all life; Also from a corpse do not withhold kindness.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּתְאַחֵר מִבּוֹכִים, וְעִם אֲבֵלִים תִּתְאַבָּל.
verses.english: Do not be late from ?criers?;  And with a mourner, mourn.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּשָּׂא לֵב מֵאוֹהֵב, כִּי מִמֶּנוּ תֵּאָהֵב.
verses.english: Do not lift [your] heart from a loved one; For from him you will be loved.

verses.hebrew: בְּכָל מַעֲשֶׂיךָ זְכוֹר אַחֲרִית, וּלְעוֹלָם לֹא תַשְׁחֵת.
verses.english: In all your actions remember the end; And never destroy.

7.heVersionTitle: Ben Sira, David Kahana ed. -- Wikisource

verses.hebrew: אַל תָּרִיב עִם אִישׁ גָּדוֹל, לָמָּה תִשּׁוֹם עַל יָדוֹ.
verses.english: Do not fight with a great man; Why become destitute by his hand.

verses.hebrew: אַל תָּרִיב עִם קָשֶׁה מִמְּךָ, לָמָּה תִפּוֹל בְּיָדוֹ.
verses.english: Do not fight with one harder than you; Why fall by his hand.

verses.hebrew: אַל תַּחֲרֹשׁ עַל אִישׁ לֹא הוֹן, פֶּן יִשְׁקֹל מְחִירְךָ וְאָבָדְתָּ.
verses.english: Do not ?plow? over a man without wealth; Perhaps he will weigh your money and you will lose.

verses.hebrew: כִּי רַבִּים הִפְחִיז זָהָב, וְהוּא יַשְׂגֶּה לֵב נְדִיבִים.
verses.english: For gold has made many reckless, and perverted [shin] the hearts of kings.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּינָץ עִם אִישׁ לָשׁוֹן, וְאַל תִּתֵּן עַל אֵשׁ עֵץ.
verses.english: Do not quarrel with a man of tongues, and heap not wood upon his fire.

verses.hebrew: אַל תְּרַגִּיל אִישׁ אֱוִיל, פֶּן יָבוּז לִנְדִיבִים
verses.english: Be not accustomed with a foolish man, lest thy ancestors be disgraced.

verses.hebrew: אַל תַּכְלִים אִישׁ שָׁב מִפֶּשֶׁע, זְכֹר כִּי כֻּלָּנוּ חַיָּבִים.
verses.english: Do not humiliate a person returning from sin; remember we are all guilty.

verses.hebrew: אַל תְּבַיֵּשׁ אֱנוֹשׁ יָשִׁיש, זְכֹר כִּי תִמָּנֶה מִזְּקֵנִים.
verses.english: Do not be wicked to an old person; remember, we shall be reckoned old too.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּתְהַלֵּל עַל גֹּוֵעַ, זְכֹר כֻּלָּנוּ נֶאֱסָפִים.
verses.english: Do not rejoice over a corpse; remember that we all gathered away.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּטֹּשׁ שִׂיחַת חֲכָמִים, וּבְחִידֹתֵיהֶם הִתְרַפֵּשׂ.
verses.english: Do not forsake the rules of the wise, and tread not on their proverbs,

verses.hebrew: [וְאַף שִׂיחוֹת חוֹל מֵהֶם לֹא, תִבְזֶה] לְהִתְיַצֵּב לִפְנֵי שָׂרִים, כִּי מִמֶּנּוּ תִּלְמַד לֶקַח.
verses.english: [And even their mundane talk do not disparage,] for it will stand you before noblemen, and from you they will learn instruction.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּמְאַס בִּשְׁמִיעַת שָׁבִים, אֲשֶׁר שָׁמְעוּ מֵאֲבֹתָם.
verses.english: Do not despise the discourse of the aged, of what they heard from their fathers,

verses.hebrew: כִּי מִמֶּנּוּ תִּקַּח שֶׂכֶל, בְּעֵת צֹרֶךְ לְהַשִׁיב פִּתְגָּם.
verses.english: for from them thou shalt learn prudence, and in a time of need to respond proverbially. [Interpretation: folk ideas have hidden local knowledge and social truths that can be hard to parse at first.]

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּצְלַח בְּנַחֲלַת רָשָׁע, פֶּן תְּבֹעַר בִּשְׁבִיב אִשּׁוֹ.
verses.english: Do not prosper in the estate of evil, lest thou be burnt with the flame of his fire.

verses.hebrew: אַל תָּזוּחַ מִפְּנֵי לֵץ, לְהוֹשִׁיבוֹ כְּאוֹרֵב לְפָנֶיךָ.
verses.english: Do not be amiable with the scorner, lest he turn & ambush you. [Interpretation: if he is bad-mouthing others, in short time he will do so about you.]

verses.hebrew: אַל תַּלְוֶה אִישׁ חָזָק מִמְּךָ, וְאִם הִלְוִיתָ כִּמְאַבֵּד.
verses.english: Do not lend to a person more powerful than you, and if lent, deem it lost.

verses.hebrew: אַל תַּעֲרֹב יָתֵר מִמְּךָ, וְאִם עָרַבְתָּ כִּמְשַׁלֵּם.
verses.english: Be not surety above thy ability; if thou be surety, set it aside as if paid.

verses.hebrew: אַל תּשָּׁפֵט עִם שׁוֹפֵט, כִּי כִּרְצוֹנוֹ יִשְׁפֹּט.
verses.english: Do not to litigate with a judge; for they will judge him according to his favor.

verses.hebrew: אִם אַכְזָרִי אַל תֵּלֵךְ, פֶּן תַּכְבִּיד אֶת רָעָתֶךָ.
verses.english: With a heartless person do not travel, lest you burden your companion;

verses.hebrew: כִּי נֹכַח פָּנָיו יֵלֵךְ, וּבְאִוַּלְתּוֹ תִּסָּפֶה.
verses.english: And so he will travel straight ahead [rashly], and by his folly you will perish. [Interpretation: someone who is careless of others, will act without regard to your needs.]

verses.hebrew: עִם בַּעַל אַף אַל תָּעִיז מֵצַח, וְאַל תִּרְכַּב עִמּוֹ בַּדֶרֶךְ.
verses.english: With a hot-tempered person do not be brazen, and do not travel with him;

verses.hebrew: כִּי קַל בְּעֵינָיו דָּמִים, וּבְאֵין מַצִּיל יַשְׁחִיתֶךָ.
verses.english: Because bloodshed is light in his eyes, and where no rescuer, he'll waste you.

verses.hebrew: עִם פּוֹתֶה אַל תִּסְתַּיֵּד, כִּי לֹא יוּכַל לְכַסּוֹת סוֹדֶךָ.
verses.english: With a gullible one do not consult, for he cannot cover your secrets.

verses.hebrew: לִפְנֵי זָר אַל תַּעַש רָז, כִּי לֹא תֵדַע מַה יֵּלֶד סוֹפוֹ.
verses.english: In the presence of a stranger do not do something odd [secret; council], for you do not know the consequences. [Interpretation: people may misconstrue different behavior and report as something it is not.]

verses.hebrew: לְכָל בָּשָׂר אַל תְּגַל לִבֶּךָ, וְאַל תַּדִּיחַ מֵעָלֶיךָ הַטּוֹבָה.
verses.english: Not with all men should one rejoice, and do not rinse [push-off] from yourself the [their] good. [Interpretation: don't be rejoiceful with everyone, for they may resent you; also, when someone does something good to you, acknowledge it gracefully, even if unwanted, so not to embarrass them.]

8.heVersionTitle: Ben Sira, David Kahana ed. -- Wikisource

verses.hebrew: אַל תְּקַנֵּא אֶת אֵשֶׁת חֵיקֶךָ, פֶּן תִּלְמַד עָלֶיךָ רָעָה.
verses.english: Do not be jealous of the wife of your bosom, lest it teach [reveal] a bad trait of yourself.

verses.hebrew: אַל תַּקְנֶא לְאִשָּׁה נַפְשְׁךָ, לְהַדְרִיכָהּ עַל בָּמוֹתֶיךָ.
verses.english: Do not be jealous of the wife of your soul, lest she trample upon your sanctuary.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּקְרַב אֶל אִשָּׁה זָרָה, פֶּן תִּפּוֹל בִּמְצוּדֹתֶיהָ.
verses.english: Do not meet with a foreign female, lest you fall into her snares.

verses.hebrew: עִם זוֹנָה אַל תִּסְתַּיֵּד‏, פֶּן תִּלָּכֵד בְּלִקְחֹתֶיהָ.
verses.english: With a harlot do not take council, lest thou be captured in her wares.

verses.hebrew: לְהִתְנַבֵּל בְּמַרְאֵה עֵינֵיךָ, וּלְשׁוֹמֵם אֲחַר בֵּיתָהּ.
verses.english: Disgraced upon seeing her, and destroyed upon leaving her house.

verses.hebrew: עִם מְנַגְּנוֹת אַל תִּדְמוֹךְ‏, פֶּן יִשְׂרְפֻךָ בְּפִיפִיֹתָם.
verses.english: With charmed women do not sleep, lest your be burned with their lips.

verses.hebrew: בִּבְתוּלָה אַל תִּתְבּוֹנֵן, פֶּן תִּוָּקֵש בַּעֲנָשֶׁיהָ.
verses.english: Gaze not on a virgin maid, lest thy be snared by her punishments.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּתֵּן לְזוֹנָה נַפְשְׁךָ, פֶּן תָּסֵב נַחֲלָתֶךָ.
verses.english: Do not give your soul to a harlot, lest you lose your inheritance.

verses.hebrew: הַעֲלִים עַיִן מֵאֵשֶׁת חֵן, וְאַל תַּבִּיט אֶל יֹפִי לֹא לָךְ.
verses.english: Hide your eyes from a graceful woman, and do not ogle beauty not yours;

verses.hebrew: בְּתֹאַר אִשָּׁה הָשְׁחְתוּ רַבִּים, [וַעֲצוּמִים כָּל הֲרוּגֶיהָ,] וְכֵן אֹהֲבֶיהָ בְּאֵשׁ תְּלַהֵט.
verses.english: By a woman’s beauty many have gone astray [And strong ones her victims], and from her loved ones in fire burned.

verses.hebrew: עִם בַּעְלָהּ אַל תִּטְעָם, וְאַל תָּסֵב עִמּוֹ שִׁכּוֹר.
verses.english: Wit her husband, do not dine, nor go around with him drunk;

verses.hebrew: פֶּן תַּטֶּה אֵלֶיהָ לֵב, וּבְדָמִים תִּטֶּה אֶל שָׁחַת.
verses.english: Lest thine heart incline unto her, and by your blood you're pushed into destruction.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּטֹּשׁ אוֹהֵב יָשָׁן, כִּי חָדָשׁ לֹא יִדְמֶה לוֹ.
verses.english: Do not abandon an old friend, for the recent one is not his equal.

verses.hebrew: יַיִן חָדָשׁ אוֹהֵב חָדָשׁ, וְיָשָׁן - אַחַר אוּלַי תִּשְׁתֶּינוּ.
verses.english: New wine is like a new friend; & if it ages, maybe you will drink it.

verses.hebrew: אַל תְּקַנֵּא בְּאִישׁ רָשָׁע, כִּי לֹא תֵּדֵע מַה יּוֹמוֹ.
verses.english: Do not envy a sinner, for you do not know his day of reckoning.

verses.hebrew: אַל תְּקַנֵּא בְּזָדוֹן מַצְלִיחַ, זְכֹר כִּי עַד מַוֶת לֹא יִנָּקֶה.
verses.english: Do not envy the success of the malicious; remember that until death he is not cleansed.

verses.hebrew: רְחַק מֵאִישׁ שַׁלִּיט לַהֲרוֹג, וְאַל תִּפְחַד פַּחֲדֵי מַוֶת.
verses.english: Keep far from a person who has authority to kill, and you will not be apprehensive of death,

verses.hebrew: וְאִם קָרַבְתָּ לֹא תֶאְשָׁם, פֶּן תִּקַּח אֶת נִשְׁמָתֶךָ.
verses.english: and if you are close, do not make a mistake, lest he take your soul.

verses.hebrew: דַּע כִּי בֵין פַּחִים תִּצְעָד, וְעַד רֶשֶׁת תִּתְהַלָּךְ.
verses.english: Recognize that you are stepping on hot coals, and in a net you are walking.

verses.hebrew: בְּכֹחֲךָ קְנֵה רֵעֶךָ, וְעִם חֲכָמִים תִּסְתַּיָּד.
verses.english: With all your power, acquire friends, and consult with the wise.

verses.hebrew: עִם נָבוֹן יְהִי חֶשְׁבּוֹנֶךָ, וְכָל סוֹדְךָ בֵּינוֹתָם.
verses.english: With intelligent people should be your calculations, and all your secrets only between yourselves.

verses.hebrew: אַנְשֵׁי צֶדֶק בַּעֲלֵי לַחְמֶך, וּבְיִרְאַת אֱלֹהִים תִּפְאַרְתֶּךָ.
verses.english: Let righteous men be your bread masters, and fear of the Lord your trappings.

verses.hebrew: בְּחַכְמֵי יָדַיִם יֵחָשֵׁב יוֹשֵׁר, וּמוֹשֵׁל בְּעַמּוֹ חָכָם.
verses.english: With the handiwork of wisdom, will it be straight, and a leader in the midst of his people is wise. [Alternative: The work of craftsmen will be praised, and the leader of the people will be wise in his speech.]

verses.hebrew: בּוֹטֶה נוֹרָא בָּעִיר, אִישׁ לָשׁוֹן וּמַשָּׂא עַל פִּיהוּ יְשֻׁנֶּא.
verses.english: Those who speak rashly sets fire to the town; a man of tongues and those that give orders are hated.

9.heVersionTitle: Ben Sira, David Kahana ed. -- Wikisource

verses.hebrew: שׁוֹפֵט עַם יוֹסֵד עַמּוֹ, וּמֶמְשֶׁלֶת מֵבִין סְדוּרָה.
verses.english: The people's judge is a foundation to his people, and his dominion will understand its orders [rulings].

verses.hebrew: מֶלֶךְ פָּרוּעַ יַשְׁחִית עִיר, וְעִיר נוֹשֶׁבֶת בְּשֶׂכֶל שָׂרֶיהָ.
verses.english: An wild king will destroy the city, and a city is settled by the intelligence of its rulers.

verses.hebrew: כְּשׁוֹפֵט עַם כֵּן מְלִיצָיו, וּכְרֹאשׁ עִיר כֵּן יוֹשְׁבָיו.
verses.english: Like the judge of the people, so are his officers; and like the head of state, so are its inhabitants.

verses.hebrew: בְּיַד אֱלֹהִים מֶמְשֶׁלֶת כָּל גֶּבֶר, וְלִפְנֵי מְחוֹקֵק יָשִׁית הוֹדוֹ.
verses.english: In the Lord’s hand is a man’s success, and before the engraver [stele] will he set God's praise.

verses.hebrew: בְּיַד אֱלֹהִים מֶמְשֶׁלֶת תֵּבֵל, וְאִישׁ לְעֵת יַעֲמוֹד עָלֶיהָ.
verses.english: In the Lord’s hand is the governance of the realm, and a timely man will he raise to stand over it.

verses.hebrew: בְּכֵל פֶּשַע אַל תְּשַׁלֵּם רַע לְרֵע, וְאַל תִּהֲלַךְ בְּדֶרֶךְ גַּאֲוָה
verses.english: For every sin, do not repay evil to your neighbor, and walk not in the way of haughtiness.

verses.hebrew: שְׂנוּאָה לְאָדוֹן וַאֲנָשִׁים גַּאֲוָה, וּמִשְּׁנֵיהֶם מַעַל עֹשֶׁק.
verses.english: Hateful before the Lord and humans is pride, and unjustly offending both.

verses.hebrew: מַלְכוּת מִגּוֹי אֶל גּוֹי תִּסֹּב, בִּגְלַל חֲמַס גַּאֲוָה.
verses.english: Dominion is transferred from nation to nation on account of violence and haughtiness.

verses.hebrew: מַה יִּגְאֶה עָפָר וָאֵפֶר, אֲשֶׁר בְּחַיָּיו יוּרַם גִּוְיוֹ.
verses.english: With what does earth and ashes behave arrogantly? because in his life he erected his back [body]?

verses.hebrew: שֶׁמֶץ מַחֲלָה יַצְהִיב רוֹפֵא, מֶלֶךְ הַיּוֹם וּמָחָר יִפּוֹל.
verses.english: The terror of the ill makes a physician shine; Today a king, and tomorrow he falls. [Alternative (1): A long illness mocks the physician  (2): A little illness reveals the skill of the healer (3): A whisper of illness makes a doctor happy.]

verses.hebrew: בְּמוֹת אָדָם יִנְחַל, רִמָּה וְתוֹלֵעָה כִּנִּים וָרֶמֶשׂ.
verses.english: When a person dies he inherits these: worms, maggots, lice and swarms.

verses.hebrew: תְּחִלַת גְּאוֹן אָדָם מוּעָז, וּמֵעֹשֶׂהוּ יָסוּר לִבּוֹ.
verses.english: The beginning of pride is to act impudently, and to those that made him he turns away his heart.

verses.hebrew: כִּי מִקְוֵה זָדוֹן חֵטְא, וּמְקוֹרָהּ יַבִּיעַ זִמָּה.
verses.english: For the pool of passion is sin, and its spring will pour out filth.

verses.hebrew: עַל כֵּן מִלֵּא לִבּוֹ אֱלֹהִים נָגַע, וַיַּכֵּהוּ עַד כַּלֵּה.
verses.english: Therefore the Lord brought upon him injury (leprosy), and smote him until destroyed.

verses.hebrew: כִּסֵּא גֵאִים הָפַך אֱלֹהִים, וַיֹּשֶׁב עֲנָוִים תַּחְתָּם.
verses.english: Thrones of the haughty did the Lord overturn, and he seated the humble in their stead.

verses.hebrew: עִקְבוֹת גּוֹיִם טִמְטֵם אֱלֹהִים, וְשָׁרְשָׁם עַד אֶרֶץ קִעֲקָע.
verses.english: Footprints of the heathens did the Lord bury, and its roots to earths core did he exterminate.

verses.hebrew: וְסִחָם מֵאֶרֶץ וַיִּתְּשֵׁם, וַיַּשְׁבֵּת מֵאֶרֶץ זִכְרָם.
verses.english: And he scraped them from the earth and rooted them out, and erased their memorial from earth. [Ezekiel 26:4. Alternatively: "He rooted out their cartilage from the land" See M. Pesachim 7:11]

verses.hebrew: לֹא נָאוֶה לֶאֱנוֹשׁ זָדוֹן, וְעַזוּת, אַף - לִילוּד אִשָּׁה.
verses.english: Pride is not becoming of humans, nor impudence & anger to those born to women.

verses.hebrew: זֶרַע נִכְבָּד מַה זָּרַע לֶאֱנוֹשׂ, [זֶרַע נִכְבָּד יְרֵא אֱלֹהִים, זֶרַע נִכְבָּד שׂוֹמֵר מִצְוָה.
verses.english: What kind of offspring is honorable? A mans offspring. Offspring who fear the Lord. Honorable offspring keep the commandments.

verses.hebrew: זֶרַע נִקְלֶה מַה זָּרַע לֶאֱנוֹשׁ], זֶרַע נִקְלֶה עוֹבֵר מִצְוָה.
verses.english: What kind of offspring is dishonorable? A mans offspring. Dishonorable offspring who transgress the commandments.

verses.hebrew: בֵּין אַחִים רֹאשָׁם נִכְבָּד, וִירֵא אֱלֹהִים בְּעַמּוֹ.
verses.english: Amongst brothers [kin] their leader is honorable, and the fear the Lord is in his people.

verses.hebrew: גֵּר וְזָר נָכְרִי וָרָשׁ, תִּפְאֶרֶת יִרְאַת אֱלֹהִים
verses.english: Immigrant and stranger, foreigner and poor person— their boast is fear of the Lord.

verses.hebrew: אֵין לִבְזוֹת דַּל מַשְׁכִּיל, וְאֵין לְכַבֵּד עַוָּל אֲשֶׁר הוּרָם.
verses.english: Do no denigrate an intelligent poor person, and do not glorify a sinful man who has risen.

verses.hebrew: נָגִיד מוֹשֶׁל וְשׁוֹפֵט נִכְבָּדוּ, וְאֵין גָּדוֹל מִיְּרֵא אֱלֹהִים.
verses.english: A noble, ruler, judge shall be glorified, but nothing is greater than fearing the Lord.

verses.hebrew: עֶבֶד מַשְׂכּיל הוּרָם, וְעֶבֶד סָכָל לֹא יִתְאוֹנֵן.
verses.english: An intelligent servant shall rise, and a foolish servant will not complain.

verses.hebrew: אַל תּתְחַכַּם לַעֲבוֹד חֶפְצֶךָ, וְאַל תִּתְכַּבֵּד בְּמוֹעֵד צָרְכֶּךָ.
verses.english: Do not be shrewd to perform your desires, and do not extol yourself in your hour of difficulty.

verses.hebrew: טוֹב עוֹבֵד וְיוֹתֵר הוֹן, מִמִּתְכַּבֵּד וַחֲסַר מַתָּן.
verses.english: Superior is a person who toils and accumulates treasure, to one who is extolled but lacks allotment.

verses.hebrew: בְּנִי בַּעֲנָוָה כַּבֵּד נַפְשֶׁךָ, וְיִתֶּן לְךָ טַעַם וְכָבוֹד אָבַדְתָּ.
verses.english: Son, in humility give honor to your soul, and it will give you the taste and respect that you lost.

verses.hebrew: מַרְשִׁיעַ נַפְשׁוֹ מִי יַצְדִיקֶנּוּ, וּמִי יְכַבֵּד מַקְלֶה נַפְשׁוֹ.
verses.english: Him who errs against his own soul—who will vindicate? And who will give repute to him who devalues his own life?

verses.hebrew: יֵשׁ דַּל נִכְבָּד בִּגְלַל שִׂכְלוֹ, וְיֵש נִכְבָּד בִּגְלַל עָשְׁרוֹ.
verses.english: There is a poor person respected for his intelligence, and there are those respected because of his wealth.

verses.hebrew: נִכְבָּד בְּעָשְׁרוֹ אֵיכָכָה, וְנִקְלֶה בְּעָנְיוֹ אֵיכָכָה.
verses.english: A person respected in wealth, how thus [higher]? A man despised in poverty, how thus [lower]?

verses.hebrew: הַמִּתְכַּבֵּד בְּדַלּוּתוֹ, בְּעָשְׁרוֹ מִתְכַּבִּד יֹתֵר.
verses.english: He who is respected in poverty, in wealth he is further respected.

verses.hebrew: וְהַנִּקְלֶה בְּעָשְׁרוֹ, בְּדַלּוּתוֹ נִקְלֶה יוֹתֵר.
verses.english: And he who is held in disrepute in wealth, how much more also in poverty?

10.heVersionTitle: Ben Sira, David Kahana ed. -- Wikisource

verses.hebrew: חָכְמַת דַּל תִּשָּׂא רֹאשׁוֹ, וּבֵין נְדִיבִים תּוֹשִׁיבֶנּוּ.
verses.english: A poor person’s wisdom will raise up his head, and it will seat him in the midst of nobles.

verses.hebrew: אַל תְּהַלֵּלו אָדָם בְּתָאֳרוֹ, וְאַל תְּתַעֵב אָדָם מְכוֹעָר בְּמַרְאֵהוּ.
verses.english: Do not praise a man for his appearance, and do not loathe a man ugly in look.

verses.hebrew: אֱלִיל בְּעוֹף דְּבֹרָה וְרֹאשׁ תְּנוּבוֹת פּרִיָהּ.
verses.english: Small among the flying is the bee, and first among all fruitage is her produce [honey].

verses.hebrew: מַעֲטֶה אֹבֵד אַל תְּהַתֵּל, וְאַל תְּקַלֵּס בִּמְרִירֵי יוֹם.
verses.english: A lost mantle do not mock, and do not decry in the bitterness of day.  [Alternative: Do not scoff at the ones whose day is bitter.]

verses.hebrew: כִּי פְלָאוֹת מַעֲשֵׂי יי, וְנֶעְלָם מֵאָדָם פָּעֳלוֹ.
verses.english: Because the works of the Lord are a wonder, and his works are hidden from humans.

verses.hebrew: רַבִּים נִדְכָּאִים יָשְׁבוּ עַל כִּסֵּא, וּבַל עָלוּ עַל לֵב עָטוּ צְנִיף.
verses.english: Many oppressed ones sat on the throne; and those not thought of wrapped in a [priestly] turban.

verses.hebrew: רַבִּים נִשָּׂאִים נִקְלוּ מְאֹד, וְהִשְׁפִּלוּ יַחַד, וְגַם נִכְבָּדִים נִתְּנוּ בְיָד.
verses.english: Many powerful people were dishonored greatly, and lowered too, and illustrious ones were delivered into the hands of others.

verses.hebrew: בְּטֶרֶם תַּחְקוֹר אַל תְּסַלֵּף, בַּקֵּר לְפָנִים וְאַחַר תַּזִּיף.
verses.english: Before investigation, do not overrule; inspect internally, and then chastise [Alternative: lend].

verses.hebrew: בְּנִי אַל תָּשִׁיב דָּבָר טֶרֶם תִּשְׁמָע, וּבְתוֹךְ שִׂיחָה אַל תְּדַבֵּר.
verses.english: My Son, before listening, do not answer, and in the middle of speaking, do not interrupt.

verses.hebrew: בְּאֵין עַצָּבָה אַל תִּתְחָר, וּבְרִיב זֵדִים אַל תְּקוֹמֵם.
verses.english: If you aren't wounded, do not kindle a dispute, and in a trial of sinners, do not stand.

verses.hebrew: בְּנִי לָמָּה תַרְבֶּה עֶשְׁקֶךָ, וְאֵין לְהַרְבּוֹת לֹא יִנָּקֶה
verses.english: My son, why add to your contentions? Do not multiply them; you won't be saved.

verses.hebrew: בְּנִי אִם לֹא תָּרוּץ לֹא תגִּיעַ, וְאִם לֹא תְּבַקֵּשׁ לֹא תִמְצָא.
verses.english: My son, if you do not pursue, you will not attain, and if you do not search, you will not find.

verses.hebrew: יֵשׁ עָמֵל וְיָגֵעַ וָרָץ, וּכְדֵי כֵן הוּא מִתְאַחֵר.
verses.english: There exists one who toils and struggles and hurries, and nevertheless he is late.

verses.hebrew: יֵשׁ רֹשֵׁשׁ וְאֹבֵד מְהַלֵּךְ, חֲסַר כֹּל וְיוֹתֵר אִישׁ עָנִי.
verses.english: There're those who are crushed and in despair walk, lacking all, and moreover are poor.

verses.hebrew: וְעֵין יי צָפַתְהוּ לְטוֹב, וַיְנַעֲרֵהוּ מֵעֲפַר צַחֲנָה.
verses.english: And the eyes of the Lord looked upon him for good, and shook off his dusty stench.

verses.hebrew: נָשָׂא בְּרֹאשׁוֹ וַיְרֹמְמֵהוּ, וַיִּתְמְהוּ עָלָיו רַבִּים.
verses.english: Carried up by his head and lifted him, and many were perplexed.

verses.hebrew: טוֹב וְרַע חַיִּים וָמָוֶת, רֵישׁ וְעֹשֶׁר מֵיי הוּא.
verses.english: Good and bad, life and death, penury and wealth are from the Lord.

verses.hebrew: חָכְמָה וְשֶׂכֶל וְהָבִין דָּבָר מֵיי הוּא, חֵטְא וּדְרָכִים יְשָׁרִים מֵיי הוּא.
verses.english: Wisdom, intelligence, and perceptivity are from the Lord, sin and straight paths are from the Lord.

verses.hebrew: שִׂכְלוּת וְחֹשֶׁךְ לְפוֹשְׁעִים נוֹצְרָה, וּמְרֵעִים רָעָה עִמָּם.
verses.english: Foolishness and darkness had been created for sinners, and along with it, evil friends.

verses.hebrew: מַתַּן צַדִּיק יַעֲמֹד לִירֵאָיו, וּרְצוֹנוֹ יִצְלַח לָעַד.
verses.english: The estate of righteousness shall remains with his fearful, and his wants shall eternally succeed .

verses.hebrew: יֵשׁ מִתְעַשּׁר מֵהִתְעַנּוֹת, וְזֶה יְחַיֵּב שְׂכָרוֹ.
verses.english: There exists one who becomes rich from his suffering, and this obligates this reward:

verses.hebrew: וּבְעֵת יֹאמַר מָצָאתִי נַחַת, וְעַתָּה אֹכַל מִטּוֹבָתִי.
verses.english: In time, he will say: “I have found rest, and now I will eat of my good.”

verses.hebrew: לֹא יָדַע מָה כִּי בָא חֲלֹף, וַעֲזָבוֹ לְאַחֵר וּמֵת.
verses.english: He does not know what's to come and pass, and he'll leave them to others and die.

verses.hebrew: בְּנִי עֲמוֹד בְּחֻקֶּךָ וּבוֹ הִתְהַלֵּךְ, וּבִמְלָאכְתְּךָ הִתְיַשֶּׁן.
verses.english: My son, stand on your principles, and walk with it, and in your work take hold strong.

verses.hebrew: (כה)אַל תִּתְמַה בְּעוֹשֵׂי רָע, תָּרוּץ לַיי וְקַוֵּה לְאוֹרוֹ.
verses.english: Do not wonder at the doings of evil, run to the Lord, and await his light.

verses.hebrew: כִּי נֹכַח בְּעֵינֵי יי, בְּפֶתַע פִּתְאֹם לְהַעֲשִׁיר דָּל.
verses.english: Because all is in front of the Lord eyes, to suddenly and quickly, make a needy person rich.

verses.hebrew: בִּרְכַּת אֵל גּוֹרָל צַדִּיק, וּבְעֵת תִּקְוָתוֹ תִּפְרָח.
verses.english: The Lord’s blessing is the righteous' lot, and in his hopeful time his good pleasure sprout.

verses.hebrew: אַל תֹּאמַר הִנֵּה כִי עָשִׂיתִי חֶפְצִי, וּמֶה עַתָּה יֵעָזֵב לִי.
verses.english: Do not say, “ill do as I wish, And if he forsakes me, what now?...

verses.hebrew: אַל תֹּאמַר דַּיִּי לְפָנַי, מַה אָסוֹן יְהִי עָלָי.
verses.english: Do not say, “I have enough, and what calamity can occur to me?”

verses.hebrew: טוֹב יוֹם תִּשָּכַח רָעָה, וְרָע יוֹם תִּשָׁכַח טוֹבָה, וְאַחֲרִית אָדָם תִּהְיֶה עָלָיו.
verses.english: In a day of prosperity, you'll forget adversity, and in a day of adversity, you'll forget good, and the end of man will be on the Lord.

verses.hebrew: עֵת רָעָה תְּשַׁכֵּח תַּעֲנוּג, וְסוֹף אָדָם יַגִּיד עָלָיו.
verses.english: A bad time and you'll forget pleasure, and in a person’s end he will tell of the Lord.

verses.hebrew: בְּטֶרֶם תַּחְקֹר אָדָם אַל תְּאַשְּׁרֵהוּ, כִּי בְּאַחֲרִיתוֹ יְאֻשַּׁר אָדָם.
verses.english: Before inspecting man, to not praise him, for in his end man will be straightened [in a coffin].

verses.hebrew: לִפְנֵי מָוֶת אַל תְּאַשֶּׁר גָּבֶר, כִּי בְּאַחֲרִיתוֹ יִנָּכֵר אִישׁ.
verses.english: Before death praise no strongman, for in his end he'll bad deeds will be known.

verses.hebrew: [מְנַע רַבִּים מִתּוֹךְ בֵּיתֶךָ], וְלֹא כָל אִישׁ לְהָבִיא אֶל בַּיִת, [אוֹרְבִים וְכֵן נוֹכְלִים רַבִּים הֵם].
verses.english: And estrange thee to them that are dear to thee.

verses.hebrew: וּמָה רַבּוּ פִּצְעֵי רוֹכֵל, [הַמַּרְגִּילִים לִדְבַר עֶרְוָה].
verses.english: Many have been the wounded peddlers, who accustom [similar to 'pearls;]  themselves to licentiousness. [Rashi Yevamot 63b: referring to men who travel to sell women’s jewelry. Their frequent dealings with women lead their husbands to harm them. Note: Talmud breaks the sentence.]

verses.hebrew: [כְּנִיצוֹץ מַבְעִיר גַּחֶלֶת], כִּכְלוּב מָלֵא עוֹף, כֵּן בָּתֵּיהֶם מְלֵאִים מִרְמָה.
verses.english: [Those who accustom themselves to licentiousness] are like a spark that ignites a coal. As a cage is full of birds, so are their houses full of deceit [Jeremiah 5:27].

verses.hebrew: כְּעוֹף אָחוּז בִּכְלוּב לֵב גֵּאֵה, וְכִזְאֵב אֹרֵב לַטֶּרֶף.
verses.english: A as a bird seized in a cage, so is the heart of haughtiness, and like a wolf ambushing his prey.

verses.hebrew: מַה יִּרְבּוּ פִּשְׁעֵי בוֹצֵעַ, כְּכֶלֶב הוּא בָא לְכָל בַּיִת וְחוֹמֵס.
verses.english: What's gained by violent sinners, like a dog they come to each house wrathfully.

verses.hebrew: כֵּן בּוֹצֵעַ בָּא, וּמֵשִׂים רִיב לְכָל שִׁבְתָּם.
verses.english: So the covetous comes, increasing strife to all the inhabitants.

verses.hebrew: אוֹרֵב הָרוֹכֵל כְּדוֹב לְבֵית לֵצִים, וְכִמְרַגֵּל יִרְאֶה עֶרְוָה.
verses.english: The ambush of the gossiper is like a bear to the house of scorners, and like a spy he searches for licentiousness.

verses.hebrew: טוֹב לְרָע יַהֲפֹךְ נִרְגָּן, וּבְמַחֲמַדֶּיךָ יִתֵּן קָשֶׁר.
verses.english: From good to bad will he turn your crowds, and on your precious things he will conspire.

verses.hebrew: מִנִּיצוֹץ יַרְבֶּה גַחֶלֶת, וְאִישׁ בְּלִיַעַל לְדָם יֶאֱרֹב.
verses.english: From a spark of fire coals are multiplied, and a sinful person lies in ambush for blood.

verses.hebrew: גּוּר מֵרַע כִּי רַע יוֹלִיד, לָמָּה מוּם עוֹלָם תִּשָּׁא.
verses.english: Be a stranger to evil, for evil births, why an eternal blemish carry.

verses.hebrew: לֹא תִדְבַּק לְרָשָׁע וִיסַלֵּף דַּרְכֶּךָ, וְיַהֲפָכְךָ מִבְּרִיתֶךָ.
verses.english: Attach thyself not to evil, to twist your ways, your covenant overturn [sim. drop].

verses.hebrew: מִשָּׁכֵן זָרִיז זָהִיר דַּרְכֶּךָ, [פֶּן יַפְרִיעַ שַׁלְוָתֶךָ], וִינַכֶּרְךָ בְּמַחֲמַדֶּיךָ.
verses.english: From a foreign neighbor, heed your way; he may tear your tranquility, and become acquainted with your valuables.

11.heVersionTitle: Ben Sira, David Kahana ed. -- Wikisource

verses.hebrew: אִם תֵּטִיב תֵּדַע לְמִי תֵטִיב, וִיהִי תִקְוָה לְטוֹבָתָךְ.
הֵיטִב לַצַּדִּיק תִּמְצָא תַשְׁלוּמַת, אִם לֹא מִמֶּנוּ מֵיְהֹוָה.
verses.english: Do good to the righteous, and find recompense; If not from him, from the Lord.

verses.hebrew: אֵין טוֹבָה לִמְנֹחַ רָשָׁע, וְגַם צְדָקָה לאֹ עָשָׂה.
verses.english: No good cometh of bestowing upon (?) him that is wicked; And (?) that hath not done righteousness.

verses.hebrew: פִּי שְׁנַיִם רָעָה תַּשִּׂיג בְּעֵת צֹרֶךְ, בְּכָל טוֹבָה תַּגִּיעַ אֵלָיו.
verses.english: A double portion of evil shalt thou obtain in time of need By all the good thou shalt have brought him.

verses.hebrew: כְּלֵי לָחֶם אַל תִּתֵּן לוֹ, לָמָּה בָם יַקְבִּיל אֵלֶיךָ.
verses.english: Weapons of war (H S) give not to him; Wherefore should he fight with them against thee?

verses.hebrew: כִּי גַם אֵל שֹוֹנֵא רָעִים, וּלָרְשָׁעִים יָשִׁיב נָקָם.
verses.english: For God also hateth them that are evil; And to the wicked he will repay vengeance.

verses.hebrew: תֵּן לַטּוֹב וּמְנַע מֵרָע, הֹקֵיר מָךְ וְאַל תִּתֵּן לְזֵר.
verses.english: Give to the good, and withhold from the evil; Honour the humble, and give not to the proud.

verses.hebrew: לֹא יִוָּדַע בַּטּוֹבָה אוֹהֵב, וְלֹא יְכֻסֶּה בְרָעָה שׂוֹנֵא.
verses.english: A friend will not be known in prosperity; And an enemy will not be hid in adversity.

verses.hebrew: בְּטוֹבַת אִישׁ גַּם שׂוֹנֵא רֵעַ, וּבְרָעָתוֹ גַּם רֵעַ בּוֹדֵד.
verses.english: In a man's prosperity even an enemy is a friend; And in his adversity even a friend separateth himself.

verses.hebrew: אַל תַּאֲמִין בְּשׂוֹנֵא לָעַד, כי כנחשת רועו יחליא.
verses.english: Never trust an enemy; For like as brass his wickedness cankereth.

verses.hebrew: וגם אם ישמע לך וִיהַלֵּךְ בְּנַחַת, תֵּן לִבְּךָ לְהִתְיָרֵא מִמֶּנּוּ.
verses.english: And even though he hearken to thee, and go crouching; Give thy heart to fear him.

verses.hebrew: הֱיֵה לוֹ כִּמְגַלֶּה רָז. וְלֹא יִמְצָא לְהַשְׁחִיתְךָ, וְדַע אַחֲרִית קִנְאָה.
verses.english: Be to him as one that revealeth a mystery (H S); And he shall not find opportunity to harm thee. And know thou the end of jealousy (H S).

verses.hebrew: אַל תַּעֲמִידֵהוּ אֶצְלֶךָ, לָמָּה יֶהְדָּפְךָ וְיֲַעמֹד תַּחְתֶּיךָ.
verses.english: Make him not to stand beside thee: Wherefore should he thrust thee away, and stand in thy place?

verses.hebrew: אַל תּוֹשִׁיבֵהוּ לִימִינֶךָ, לָמָּה יְבַקֵּשׁ מוֹשָׁבֶךָ.
verses.english: Set him not on thy right hand: Wherefore should he seek thy seat?

verses.hebrew: וּלְאָחוֹר תַּשִּׂיג אֲמָרַי, וּלְאַחְוָתִי תִּתְאַנָּח.
verses.english: And afterwards thou shalt attain unto my words; And shalt lament at my lament.

verses.hebrew: מִי יוּחַן חוֹבֵר נָשׁוּךְ, וְכָל הַקָּרֵב אֶל חַיַּת שֵׁן.
verses.english: Who will pity (?) a charmer that is stung; Or anyone that cometh nigh to a ravenous beast?

verses.hebrew: כֵּן חוֹבֵר אֶל אִישׁ זָדוֹן, וּמִתְגֹלֵל בַּעֲוֹנֹתָיו.
verses.english: So is he that joineth himself to an impious man (G S), And walloweth in his iniquities.

verses.hebrew: לֹא יַעֲבֹר, עַד תִּבְעַר בּוֹ אֵשׁ.
verses.english: He shall not escape, until a fire be kindled in him.

verses.hebrew: כַּאֲשֶׁר יָבוֹא עִמְּךָ, לֹא יִתְגַּלֶּה לָךְ.
verses.english: When he cometh with thee, he will not bewray himself unto thee;

verses.hebrew: וְאִם תִּפּוֹל, לֹא יִפֹּל לְהַצִּילֶךָ.
verses.english: And if thou fall, thou shalt not be able (S) to deliver thyself (?).

verses.hebrew: עַד עֵת מָעַד לֹא יוֹפִיעַ, וְאִם תִּמּוֹט לֹא יִתְכַּלְכָּל.
verses.english: So long as thou standest (?), he will not shew himself; And if thou (G) totter, he will not bear up.

verses.hebrew: בְּשְׂפָתָיו יִתְמַהְמַהּ צָר, וּבְלִבּוֹ יַחְשׁוֹב מַהֲמֹרוֹת עֲמוּקוֹת.
verses.english: With his lips will an adversary speak sweetly (G), While he deviseth deep pitfalls in his heart.

verses.hebrew: וְגַם אִם בּעֵינָיו יַדְמִיעַ אוֹיֵב, אִם מָצָא עֵת לֹא יִשְׂבַּע דָּם.
verses.english: And even though an enemy weep with his eyes; When he hath found a season, he will not be satiated with blood.

verses.hebrew: אִם רַע קְרָאֲךָ נִמְצָא שָׁם, כְּאִישׁ סוֹמֵךְ יְחַפֵּש עָקֹב.
verses.english: If mischief hath befallen thee, he is found there; As a man that would help, he will seek reward (or to supplant).

verses.hebrew: רֹאשׁ יָנִיעַ וְהֵנִיף יָדוֹ, וּלְרוֹבֶה לָחַשׁ יְשַׁנֶּא פָנִים.
verses.english: He will shake his head, and wave his hand; And with much whispering (?) he will change his countenance.

12.heVersionTitle: Ben Sira, David Kahana ed. -- Wikisource

verses.hebrew: נוֹגֵעַ בְּזֶפֶת תִּדְבַּק יָדוֹ, וְחוֹבֵר אֶל לֵץ יִלְמַד דַּרְכּוֹ.
verses.english: Whoso toucheth pitch, it shall cleave to his hand (?); And he that hath fellowship with a scorner will learn his way.

verses.hebrew:
כָּבֵד מִמְּךָ מַה תִּשָּׂא, וְאֶל עָשִׁיר מִמְּךָ מַה תִּתְחַבָּר.
(ב) מַה יְחֻבַּר פָּרוּר אֶל סִיר, אֲשֶׁר הוּא נוֹקֵשׁ בּוֹ וְהוּא נִשְׁבָּר.
(ב) אוֹ מַה יְּחֻבַּר, עָשִׁיר אֶל דָּל.
verses.english:
What is too heavy for thee wherefore shouldest thou lift? And wherefore have fellowship with one that is richer than thou?
What fellowship shall earthen pot have with kettle, When if this smite that, it is dashed in pieces?
What fellowship shall the rich have with the poor?

verses.hebrew: עָשִׁיר יְעַוֶּה הוּא יִתְנַוֶּה, וְאִם דַּל יְעַוֶּה הוּא יִתְחַנָּן.
verses.english: The rich doeth a wrong, and he boasteth himself of it (?): The poor is wronged, and he must entreat withal (?).

verses.hebrew: אִם תִּכְשַׁר לוֹ יַעֲבֹד בָּךְ, וְאִם תִּכְרַע לֹא יַחְמֹל עָלֶיךָ.
verses.english: If thou be right for him, he will make thee serve him; And if thou be brought low, he will be sparing of thee.

verses.hebrew: אִם שַלְּךָ יֵיטִיב דְּבָרָיו עִמָּךְ, וִירֹשֶׁשְׁךָ וְלֹא יִכְאַב לוֹ.
verses.english: If thou have substance (?), he will speak thee fair; And he will impoverish thee, and will not be sorry.

verses.hebrew: צֹרֶךְ לוֹ עִמְּךָ וְהָשִׁיעַ לָךְ, וְשׁוֹחֵק לְךָ וְהִבְטִיחֶךָ.
verses.english: Hath he need of thee? then he will toy with thee (?); And he will smile upon thee, and encourage thee.

verses.hebrew:
עַד אֲשֶׁר תּוֹעִיל יְהָתֵל בָּךְ, פַעֲמַיִם שָׁלֹשׁ יַעֲרִיצֶךָ.
(ז) וּבְכֵן יִרְאֲךָ לְהִתְעַבֵּר בָּךְ, וּבְרֹאשׁוֹ יָנִיעַ אֵלֶיךָ.
verses.english: So long as it profiteth he will cajole thee. Twice or thrice he will shew thee reverence (?); And then he will look at thee and pass thee by (?); And will wag his head at thee.

verses.hebrew: הִשָּׁמֵר אַל תִּרְהַב מְאֹד, וְאַל תִּדְמֶה בַּחֲסֵירֵי מַדָּע.
verses.english: Take heed that thou be not urgent (?) overmuch; And be not like to them that lack intelligence.

verses.hebrew: קָרֵב נָדִיב הֱיֶה רָחוֹק, וּכְדֵי כֵן יַגִּישֶׁךָ.
verses.english: Doth a noble draw near? be thou distant; And so much the more he will approach thee.

verses.hebrew: אַל תִּתְקָרֵב פֶּן תִּתְרַחֵק, וְאַל תִּתְרַחֵק פֶּן תִּשָּׂנֵא.
verses.english: Come not near, lest thou be put far off; And stand not far off, lest thou be forgotten (G).

verses.hebrew:
אַל תִּבְטַח לְחֹפֶשׁ עִמּוֹ, וְאַל תַּאֲמִין לְרֹב שִׂיחוֹ.
(יא) כִּי מַרְבִּית שִׂיחוֹ נִסּיוֹן, וְשֹׂחֵק לְךָ וַחֲקָרֶךָ.
verses.english:
Make not bold to be free (?) with him; And mistrust thou his much talk.
For with his much talk maketh he trial of thee; And he will smile upon thee, and search thee out.

verses.hebrew: אַכְזָרִי יִתֵּן כֹּשֶׂל וְלֹא יַחְמוֹל, עַל נֶפֶשׁ רַבִּים קוֹשֵׂר קָשֶר.
verses.english: He that is cruel will speak peace (?) and spare not; While he plotteth a plot against the life of many.

verses.hebrew: הִשָּׁמֵר וֶהְיֵה זָהִיר, וְאַל תִּתְהַלֵּךְ עִם אַנְשֵׁי חָמָס.
verses.english: Take heed and beware; And go not with men of violence.

verses.hebrew: כָּל הַבָּשָׂר יֶאֱהַב מִינוֹ, וְכָל אָדָם אֶת הַדּוֹמֶה לוֹ.
verses.english: All flesh loveth its kind; And every man him that is like unto him.

verses.hebrew: מִין כָּל בָּשָׂר אֶצְלוֹ, וְאֶל מִינוֹ יְחֻבַּר אָדָם.
verses.english: The kind of all flesh consorteth therewith; And a man will have fellowship with his kind.

verses.hebrew: מַה יְּחֻבַּר זְאֵב אֶל כֶּבֶשׂ, כַּךְ רָשָׁע לַצַּדִיק, וְכֵן עָשִׁיר אֶל אִישׁ נֶאֱצָל.
verses.english: What fellowship shall wolf have with lamb? Such is the wicked to the righteous; And so is the rich unto a man that is destitute.

verses.hebrew: מֵאַיִן שָׁלוֹם צָבוּעַ אֶל כָּלֶב, מֵאַיִן שְׁלוֹם עָשִׁיר אֶל רָשׁ.
verses.english: How should there be (?) peace between hyena and dog? How should there be peace between rich and poor?

verses.hebrew: מַאֲכַל אֲרִי פִּרְאֵי מִדְבָּר, כֵּן מַרְעִית עָשִׁיר דַּלִּים.
verses.english: Wild asses of the wilderness are food for the lion: So the poor are the prey of the rich.

verses.hebrew: תּוֹעֲבַת גַּאֲוָה עֲנָוָה, וְתוֹעֲבַת עָשִׁיר אֶבְיוֹן.
verses.english: Lowliness is the abomination of pride; And the needy is the abomination of the rich.

verses.hebrew: עָשִׁיר מוּט נִסְמָךְ מֵרֵעַ, וְדַל נָמוֹט נִדְחָה מֵרֵעַ אֶל רֵעַ.
verses.english: A rich man when he is shaken is held up (?) of a friend; But the poor when he is shaken is thrust from evil to evil (?).

verses.hebrew: עָשִׁיר מְדַבֵּר וְעוֹזְרָיו רַבִּים, וּדְבָרָיו מְכוֹעֲרִין מְיוּפִּין.
verses.english: The rich speaketh, and his helpers are many; And his unseemly words are overlaid (?).

verses.hebrew: דַּל נָמוֹט מְדַבֵּר גָּע גָּע יִשֶּׂא, וְדִבֶּר מַשְׂכִּיל וְאֵין לוֹ מָקוֹם.
verses.english: A poor man speaketh (G S), and they hoot at him (?); Though he be wise that speaketh, there is no place for him.

verses.hebrew: עָשִׁיר דּוֹבֵר הַכֹּל נִסְכָּתוּ, וְאֶת שִׂכְלוֹ עַד עָב יַגִּיעוּ.
verses.english: When the rich speaketh, all keep silence; And (?) they extol his wisdom to the clouds.

verses.hebrew: דַּל דּוֹבֵר מִי זֶה יֹאמֵרוּ, וְאִם נִתְקַל גַּם הֵם יֶהְדֳּפוּהוּ.
verses.english: When the poor speaketh, Who is this? say they; And if he stumble, they will help to overthrow him.

verses.hebrew: טוֹב הָעֹשֶׂר אִם אֵין עָוֹן, וְרַע הָעוֹנִי עַל פִּי זָדוֹן.
verses.english: Good is wealth, if it be without iniquity; And evil is poverty in the mouth of arrogancy.

verses.hebrew: לֵב אֱנוֹשׁ יְשַׁנֵּא פָנָיו, אִם לְטוֹב וְאִם לְרָע.
verses.english: The heart of a man changeth his countenance; Whether for good or for evil.

verses.hebrew: עִקְבוֹת לֵב טוֹב פָּנִים אוֹרִים, וְשִׂיג וְשִׂיחַ מַחֲשֶׁבֶת עָמָל.
verses.english: A token of a merry heart is a bright countenance; And study and meditation is wearisome thought (?).

13.heVersionTitle: Ben Sira, David Kahana ed. -- Wikisource

verses.hebrew: אַשְׁרֵי אֱנוֹשׁ לֹא עֲזָבוֹ פִיהוּ, וְלֹא אָבַח עָלָיו דִּין לִבּוֹ.
verses.english: Happy is the man whom his own mouth hath not troubled; And whose heart hath not condemned him (?).

verses.hebrew: אַשְׁרֵי אִישׁ לֹא חִסַּדְתּוֹ נַפְשׁוֹ, וְלֹא שָׁבְתָה תּוֹחַלְתּוֹ.
verses.english: Happy is the man whose soul hath not reproached (H failed) him; And whose expectation hath not ceased.

verses.hebrew: לְלֵב קָטֹן לֹא נָאוֶה עֹשֶׁר, וּלְאִישׁ רַע עַיִן לֹא נָאוֶה חָרוּץ.
verses.english: Wealth is not comely for a little heart; And fine gold is not comely for one whose eye is evil.

verses.hebrew: מוֹנֵעַ לְנַפְשׁוֹ יִקְבֹּץ לְאַחֵר, וּבְטוֹבָתוֹ יִתְבַּעְבֵּעַ זָר.
verses.english: He that stinteth (?) himself gathereth for another; And a stranger shall revel (?) in his goods.

verses.hebrew: רַע לְנַפְשׁוֹ לְמִי יֵיטִיב, וְלֹא יִרְאֶה בְּטוֹבָתוֹ.
verses.english: He that is evil to himself, to whom will he be good? And he will not enjoy (?) his own goods.

verses.hebrew: רַע לְנַפְשׁוֹ אֵין רַע מִמֶּנּוּ, וְעִמּוֹ תּשְלוּמַת רָעָתוֹ.
verses.english: There is none more evil than he that is evil to himself; And he hath with him the recompense of his wickedness.

verses.hebrew: בְּעֵין כּוֹשֵׁל מְעַט הוּא חֶלְקוֹ, וְלוֹקֵחַ חֵלֶק רֵעֵהוּ מְאַבֵּד חֶלְקוֹ.
verses.english: In the eye of a fool (S) his portion is small; But he that taketh his neighbour's portion wasteth his own (?).

verses.hebrew:
עַיִן רַע עָיִן תָּעִיט עַל לָחֶם, וּמְהוּמָה עַל שֻלְחָנוֹ.
(י) עַיִן טוֹבָה מַרְבֶּה הַלָּחֶם, וּמַעְיָן יָבֵשׁ יִזַּל מַיִם עַל הַשֻּׁלְחָן.
verses.english:
The eye of him that hath an evil eye (?) is grudging (G) of bread; And there is famine at his table.
An evil (S) eye lavishing bread Is as a fountain dried up that should well with water (?).

verses.hebrew: בְּנִי אִם יֵשׁ לְךָ שָׁרֵית נַפְשֶׁךָ, וְאִם יֵשׁ לְךָ הֵיטִיב לָךְ.
verses.english: My son, if thou hast wherewithal, minister (S) to thine own self; And if thou hast, do good unto thyself; And according to the power of ∥ thy hand, make thyself fat.

verses.hebrew:
וּלְאֵל יָדְךָ הִדָּשֵׁן, זְכוֹר כִּי לֹא בִשְׁאוֹל תַּעֲנוּג.
(יב) וְלֹא מָוֶת יִתְמַהְמַהּ, וְחֹק לִשְׁאוֹל לֹא הֻגַּד לָךְ.
verses.english: Remember that there is no luxury in Sheol; And death doth not tarry; And the decree of Sheol (?) hath not been declared to thee.

verses.hebrew: בְּטֶרֶם תָּמוּת הֵיטִב לְאוֹהֵב, וְהַשִּׂיגַת יָדְךָ תֶּן לוֹ.
verses.english: Do good to a friend before thou die; And as thy hand attaineth (?) give unto him.

verses.hebrew:
אַל תִּמְנַע מִטּוֹבַת יוֹם, [וְאַל תִּמְנַע מִטּוֹבָה נַפְשֶׁךָ].
(יד) וּבְהִלֶּקַח אָח אַל תְּעַבֵּר, וַחֲמוּד רֵעַ אַל תַּחְמֹד.
verses.english: Refuse not the day's good cheer. But encroach not upon a brother's portion (?); And covet not the desirable things of a neighbour.

verses.hebrew: הֲלֹא לְאַחֵר תַּעֲזוֹב חֵילֶךָ, וִיגִיעֲךָ לְיוֹדֵי גוֹרָל.
verses.english: Shalt thou not leave thy riches to another; And thy labour to them that cast lots?

verses.hebrew:
תֵּן לְאָח וְחֹנֵן וּפַנֵּק נַפְשֶׁךָ, כִּי אֵין בִּשְׁאוֹל לְבַקֵּשׁ תַּעֲנוּג.
(טז) וְכָל דָּבָר שֶׁיָּפֶה לַעֲשׂוֹת, לִפְנֵי אֱלֹהִים עֲשֶׂה.
verses.english:
Give to a brother (H), and let thy soul fare delicately; For there is no seeking of luxury in Sheol.
And whatsoever thing is seemly to do; Do it before (?) God.

verses.hebrew: כָּל הַבָּשָׂר כַּבֶּגֶד יִבְלֶה, וְחֹק עוֹלָם גֹּוֵעַ יִגְוָעוּ.
verses.english: All flesh waxeth old as a garment; And the everlasting decree is, They shall surely perish.

verses.hebrew:
כְּפֶרַח עָלֶה עַל עֵץ רַעֲנָן, שֶׁזֶּה נוֹבֵל וְאַחֵר צוֹמֵחַ.
(יח) כֵּן דּוֹרוֹת בָּשָׂר וָדָם, אֶחַד גֹּוֵעַ וְאֶחַד גּוֹמֵל.
verses.english:
As leaves grow upon a green tree, Whereof one withereth, and another springeth up;
So of the generations of flesh and blood, One perisheth, and another ripeneth (M).

verses.hebrew: כָּל מַעֲשָׂיו רָקוֹב יִרְקָבוּ, וּפֹעַל יָדָיו יִמָּשֵׁךְ אַחֲרָיו.
verses.english: All his works shall surely rot; And his handywork shall draw after him.

verses.hebrew: אַשְׁרֵי אֱנוֹשׁ בְּחָכְמָה יֶהְגֶּה, וּבִתְבוּנָה יִשְׁעֶה.
verses.english: Happy is the man that shall meditate in wisdom; And shall have respect to understanding.

verses.hebrew: הַשָּׂם עַל דְרָכֶיהַ לִבּוֹ, וּבִתְבוּנֹתֶיהַ יִתְבּוֹנָן.
verses.english: That setteth his heart upon her ways; And considereth her paths (S).

verses.hebrew: לָצֵאת אַחֲרֶיהָ בְחֵקֶר, וְכָל מְבוֹאֶיהָ יְרַצֵּד.
verses.english: Going forth after her in search of her; And spying all her entries.

verses.hebrew: הַמַּשְׁקִיף בְּעַד חֲלוֹנָה, וְעַל פְּתָחֶיהָ יְצוֹתֵת.
verses.english: That prieth through her window; And will hearken at her doors.

verses.hebrew: הַחוֹנֶה סְבִיבוֹת בֵּיתָהּ, וְהֵבִיא יְתֵדָיו בְּקִירָהּ.
verses.english: He that encampeth about her house; And driveth his pegs (?) into her wall.

verses.hebrew: וְנוֹטֶה אָהֳלוֹ עַל יָדָהּ, וְשָׁכַן שֹׁכֶן טוֹב.
verses.english: And he pitcheth his tent by her side; And dwelleth in good neighbourhood.

verses.hebrew: וְיָשִׂים קִנּוֹ בְעָפְיָהּ, וּבַעֲנָפֶיהָ יִתְלוֹנָן.
verses.english: And he will set his nest on her bough; And will lodge in her branches.

verses.hebrew: וְחוֹסֶה בְּצִלָּהּ מֵחֹרֶב, וּבִמְעוֹנוֹתֶיהָ יִשְׁכֹּן.
verses.english: And he sheltereth in her shade from the heat; And will dwell in her habitations.

14.heVersionTitle: Ben Sira, David Kahana ed. -- Wikisource

verses.hebrew: כִּי יְרֵא יְהֹוָה יַעֲשֶׂה זֹאת, וְתוֹפֵשׂ תּוֹרָה יַדְרִיכֶנָּה.
verses.english: For he that feareth the Lord shall do this; And he that layeth hold on the law shall attain unto her (?).

verses.hebrew: וְקִדְּמַתְהוּ כָאֵם, וּכְאֵשֶׁת נְעוּרִים תְּקַבְּלֶנּוּ.
verses.english: And she shall meet him as mother; And receive him as wife of youth.

verses.hebrew: וְהֶאֱכִילַתְהוּ לֶחֶם שָׂכֶל, וּמֵי תְבוּנָה תַּשְׁקֶנּוּ.
verses.english: And she shall feed him with bread of wisdom; And give him water of understanding to drink.

verses.hebrew: וְנִשְׁעַן עָלֶיהָ וְלֹא יִמּוֹט, וּבָהּ יִבְטַח וְלֹא יֵבוֹשׁ.
verses.english: And he shall be stayed upon her, and shall not be moved; And in her shall he trust, and he shall not be confounded.

verses.hebrew: וְרוֹמְמַתְהוּ מֵרֵעֵהוּ, וּבְתוֹךְ קָהָל תִּפְתַּח פִּיו.
